content:
Goal: Create a square men's fashion lookbook collage featuring {argument name="model description" default="a fit adult man with short dark hair and trimmed beard"} wearing a monochrome beige streetwear outfit, with the face anonymized by a soft rectangular blur or solid skin-tone privacy block in every view.

Canvas: 1:1 square image, warm editorial fashion photography, high resolution, natural sunlight, beige and sand color palette.

Layout: Use exactly 5 photo panels separated by clean white gutters. The left half is a 2-by-2 grid of four smaller full-body outfit shots. The right half is one large vertical close-up portrait panel spanning the full height.

Panel count and contents:
1. Top-left panel: full-body walking pose angled slightly forward, hands relaxed, white sneakers visible, cactus and desert plants in the background.
2. Top-middle/upper-left grid panel: front-facing three-quarter pose, model looking down slightly, hands clasped near chest, hoodie details visible.
3. Bottom-left panel: side/back walking pose from the left, hoodie hood and cargo pants silhouette visible.
4. Bottom-middle/lower-left grid panel: side walking pose from the right, one foot lifted, showing the tapered cargo pants and white sneakers.
5. Right large panel: close cropped upper-body portrait from chest to head, oversized face privacy rectangle centered over the face, beige hoodie fabric texture prominent, gold chain necklace visible, hand raised near chest with a ring.

Subject details: Outfit consists of exactly 4 main visible fashion pieces: {argument name="hoodie color" default="sand beige"} pullover hoodie, matching slim cargo jogger pants with side pockets, clean white low-top sneakers, and a gold chain necklace. Add a watch or bracelet subtly on one wrist and a ring on one finger. Keep the styling minimal, expensive casual, neutral-toned, and coordinated.

Environment: Minimal desert-inspired indoor studio with textured tan plaster walls, concrete floor, warm sunlight casting soft shadows, narrow architectural openings, and sparse cacti or succulent plants placed near the left panels.

Visual style: Photorealistic fashion editorial, warm golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field in the close-up, crisp clothing texture, muted beige monochrome grading, clean Instagram lookbook composition.

Constraints: No text, no logos, no watermark. Preserve the five-panel collage exactly. The face must remain obscured in all panels. Do not add extra people or extra clothing colors beyond the beige, white, gold, and natural desert tones.

content:
Goal: Create a warm editorial menswear collage showing one stylish adult man modeling a monochrome beige streetwear outfit in a sunlit desert-studio setting, with his face intentionally covered by a soft rectangular privacy blur.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, approximately 1024 x 1024, arranged as a fashion lookbook contact sheet with thin tan dividers between panels.

Layout: Use exactly 5 image panels. The left half is a 2 x 2 grid of four full-body outfit shots. The right half is one large vertical close-up portrait panel occupying the full height. In the four smaller panels, show the same man in slightly different standing and walking poses. In the large right panel, crop from the top of the hair to mid-thigh, emphasizing the hoodie, jewelry, watch, and cargo pants.

Subject details: The model is a fit middle-aged man with tanned skin, dark slicked-back hair, and a short salt-and-pepper beard visible below the face blur. He wears a {argument name="outfit color" default="sand beige"} oversized pullover hoodie with a kangaroo pocket, matching slim cargo jogger pants with side pockets, and light beige low-top sneakers. Add visible accessories: exactly 2 layered gold necklaces with round pendants, exactly 1 wristwatch, exactly 3 stacked bracelets, and exactly 1 ring. The model should look relaxed and confident, hands sometimes in pockets, sometimes by his sides.

Environment: Minimal Mediterranean/desert interior with textured beige plaster walls, sandy floor, soft architectural blocks, arched niche details, dried pampas grass in a vase, and strong golden sunlight casting diagonal shadows across the wall. Keep the palette monochrome tan, camel, cream, and warm gold.

Visual style: High-end fashion editorial photography, realistic, warm cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field in the close-up panel, crisp fabric texture, premium lifestyle catalog mood, clean composition, no visible brand logos.

Privacy blur: Cover the face in every panel with a smooth vertical rectangular blur/mosaic matching the skin-tone colors underneath; the blur should hide facial identity while leaving hair, beard edges, neck, clothing, and accessories visible.

Constraints: Show exactly 5 panels, exactly 4 full-body views on the left and exactly 1 large close-up on the right. No text, no watermark, no extra models, no logos, no hats, no sunglasses.

content:
Goal: Create a high-end dark luxury advertising demonstration graphic for an AI image editor, showing a cosmetic serum ad being decomposed into editable layers.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 banner, deep navy-black background with gold light streaks, cinematic glossy lighting, premium beauty-brand mood, ultra-detailed photorealistic product rendering.

Layout: On the left, show one complete vertical finished poster inside a thin gold border. In the center, place a large glowing gold arrow pointing from the finished poster toward the editable composition. Across the top center, add the title “{argument name="software title" default="Reve 2.0"}” in large elegant serif gold-white lettering, with the subtitle “AI画像をレイヤー編集” beneath it in white. On the center-right, show the enlarged source model image: a woman in a dark satin evening dress photographed from behind with a shiny shoulder, hair rim-lit by warm light, city night bokeh behind her, and a large soft rectangular face-obscuring block over her face. On the far right, display separated editable layer elements floating with blue dashed selection boxes and small square resize handles.

Left finished poster details: The poster advertises “{argument name="product name" default="Noxellia 3X"}” with the English sublabel “NIGHT REPAIR SERUM.” It contains exactly 1 female model, 1 dark blue serum bottle with gold dropper, 1 pale gold flower accent, 1 nighttime city skyline background, and Japanese ad copy in white and gold. Include the large central Japanese headline “翌朝、艶印象が変わる。” in ornate serif type, small top copy “一晩で、肌の修復力を最大化する,” mid copy “高濃度ナイトリペアセラム,” and bottom supporting text “通常の3倍濃度の独自成分を、1滴に凝縮。” The woman’s face in the poster is also covered by a soft rectangular blur/censor block.

Editable layer callouts: Show exactly 7 separate blue dashed selection rectangles with glowing cyan corner handles: 1 around the large central headline “翌朝、艶印象が変わる。”, 1 around the smaller central supporting sentence “通常の3倍濃度の独自成分を、1滴に凝縮。”, 1 around the top-right Japanese phrase “一晩で、肌の修復力を最大化する”, 1 around the right-side phrase “高濃度ナイトリペアセラム”, 1 around the isolated product bottle plus flower, 1 around a cropped city skyline strip, and 1 around a thin gold curved line near the bottom right.

Bottom feature row: Add exactly 3 gold icon-and-text feature blocks along the bottom of the central/right area: 1 droplet icon labeled “独自3倍濃度” with small explanatory Japanese copy, 1 crescent moon and stars icon labeled “夜の集中ケア” with small explanatory Japanese copy, and 1 bottle icon labeled “上質な所有感” with small explanatory Japanese copy.

Visual style: Luxury skincare advertising, black and midnight blue palette, champagne gold typography, sparkling lens flares, elegant serif Japanese type, glowing cyan UI handles, clean composition, realistic reflections on the serum bottle, glossy skin highlights, dramatic rim light, premium cosmetic campaign aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep all Japanese text legible and positioned as described, preserve the dark gold luxury look, use no watermarks or app chrome, make the layer boxes look like non-destructive editing overlays, and include exactly the counted elements and selection boxes.

A closed book and black pen rest beside the phone for scale. Warm natural lighting, cinematic shadows, ultra-sharp liquid splash details, hyper-realistic skin and glass reflections, commercial photography aesthetic, 8K quality.

content: Create a highly detailed fantasy patisserie product shot of a single round whole cake themed after {argument name="character name" default="Nozomu"}, presented as if an original anime character has been transformed into an official celebration cake. The cake is one large cylindrical tier on a white porcelain plate with gold trim, decorated in pale icy blue, lavender, cream, pearl white, and metallic gold. Include exactly two character depictions: one three-dimensional anime-girl cake topper emerging from the top center, and one oval framed portrait on the front side of the cake. The character has {argument name="hair color" default="long pale blonde hair"}, a blue-lavender witch or magician aesthetic, an oversized ornate wide-brim hat covered with blue and pink flowers, gold filigree, and a corset-style dark blue dress with puffed off-shoulder sleeves; keep the face softly hidden or covered by a plain skin-toned rectangular mask so the image reads as a customizable character-template cake. On the cake top, surround the topper with dense piped buttercream rosettes, shell swirls, pearl sugar beads, glossy blue gem candies, crystal-like ice shards, crescent-moon glass decorations, and many small flowers in blue, white, lavender, and blush pink. At the front top center place an ornate cream plaque with raised gold baroque trim and the visible Japanese name text {argument name="plaque text" default="のぞむ"} in elegant brown-gold lettering. On the side of the cake, create pale blue gradient icing with sparkling sugar speckles, gold scrollwork, dangling blue jewel accents, white piped borders, and an elaborate oval gold frame containing the second portrait of the same character, also with the face covered by a skin-toned rectangular mask. Include exactly three warm lanterns in the background: one blurred tall lantern on the left, one sharp antique streetlamp-style lantern just behind the cake on the right, and one blurred hanging lantern in the upper right. Set the scene in a dreamy nighttime glass-garden or magical patisserie environment with soft bokeh lights, reflections, floating petals, shallow depth of field, luxurious macro detail, luminous highlights, and a romantic fairytale atmosphere. Use a vertical 4:5 composition, centered cake, photorealistic 3D anime illustration quality, ultra intricate frosting texture, sparkling jewels, and no extra words besides the plaque text.

content: [Person] Image 1, Image 2 [Pose and expression of the person] In a low-angle pose looking down at the camera, the right hand is stretched long in front of the camera lens to hold the [{argument name="product" default="product"} in Image 3] with great emphasis. The left hand is raised to shoulder height with fingers slightly spread, and looks straight ahead with a refreshing and lively expression with the mouth slightly open. [Character Outfit] Wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="ribbed knit sleeveless top"} similar in color to the [Image 3] product. A lightweight top that gives a refreshing summer feel, highlighting the person's shoulder and arm lines to emphasize a fresh seasonal look. [Character Hair and Makeup Details] {argument name="hairstyle" default="Long brown straight hair"} styled to look wet and moist is naturally swept back. Makeup is based on a transparent and moist skin expression, with lively pink blush applied widely on both cheeks to add a juicy look, and lips finished with a moist texture with natural vitality. [Lighting and Light Direction] Intense and bright midday natural light from a clear outdoor setting shines directly on the front of the person and the skincare product. Strong sunlight passes through the transparent cosmetic container, creating clear highlights and brightly illuminating the person's features and skin texture without shadows. [Texture and Color Mood] The blue of the sky and the refreshing mint color of the outfit and product harmonize to create an extremely cool and clean summer mood. The fine bubble texture inside the serum container, the smooth container surface texture, the dense ribbed fabric texture of the outfit, and the gloss of the moist skin are vividly expressed. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] Photographed from an extreme low-angle 'worm's-eye view' looking up at the sky from the ground. Using a very shallow depth of field, the cosmetic bottle located directly in front of the camera is captured very large and clearly, while the person's face and body located behind are softly out-of-focused and blurred. [Background Elements (Optional)] A clear and clean summer blue sky with almost no clouds fills the entire screen as the background. Only in the lower right part is a very soft part of a white cumulus cloud slightly hung, making it a minimalist outdoor background that further enhances the refreshing colors of the person and product.

content:
{argument name="brand" default="[BRAND NAME]"}. You are a fashion photographer and creative director producing a luxury editorial lookbook for a custom-designed football jersey from this brand.

SUBJECT AND COMPOSITION (FLOATING AND ANGLED):
A single premium football jersey floats suspended in mid-air, centered in the frame, with no visible hanger. The jersey is angled approximately 15 degrees from frontal view to reveal depth and form. Despite floating, the fabric shows realistic weight, gravity-defying folds, natural creases, and wrinkles, feeling like a real heavy garment frozen in mid-air rather than a rigid 3D model.

BRANDED DESIGN:
The jersey reflects the visual identity of {argument name="brand" default="[BRAND NAME]"}. The official logo is authentically applied as the main club crest on the chest, using an embroidered patch or high-quality heat transfer.

MATERIALS AND TEXTURE:
Fabric: heavyweight, retro-inspired athletic cotton-blend or technical knit with a visible coarse weave structure. Tactile and luxurious.

ENVIRONMENT AND BACKGROUND:
The jersey floats within a seamless, infinite white studio cyclorama. Background is pure, clean white with no distractions, placing all visual focus on the suspended garment.

LIGHTING AND PHOTOGRAPHY STYLE:
Hyper-realistic editorial fashion photography. High-key, clean aesthetic. Sophisticated studio lighting with soft diffused light sculpting the fabric folds and highlighting texture against the white background. Subtle soft shadows define the jersey's form in the white space.

content: Create a high-end photorealistic product mockup of a custom anime mecha-themed smartphone case displayed beside a matching phone lock screen. The main subject is an iPhone Pro-style device standing upright at a slight angle on a dark red leather surface, wearing a glossy transparent hard case with metallic red, black, white, and gold armor-panel artwork inspired by a masked red ace pilot and a white horned robot helmet. Include a triple-lens camera cutout at the upper left, beveled clear edges, reflective plastic, tiny gold rivets, red mechanical side panels, and printed gold text reading “PRINCIPALITY OF ZEON” near the top, “CHAR AZNABLE,” “THE RED COMET,” and Japanese red text “赤い彗星” near the bottom, plus a small gold emblem. Attach a luxury dangling accessory from the left side: a gold chain, a gold faction-style emblem charm, a red fabric strap with gold text “CHAR AZNABLE” and chevron marks, and a small metallic helmet charm. To the right, place a second iPhone standing behind it with a black glass front and red metallic frame, showing a lock screen at 10:30, Tuesday, May 20, with a blurred matching character wallpaper, small lock icon, status icons, bottom camera icon, and the label “RED COMET.” Use dramatic warm studio lighting, shallow depth of field, premium macro product photography, realistic reflections, leather texture, cinematic shadows, and a dark collector’s desk background. The visible composition contains exactly 2 phones and exactly 4 dangling accessory elements: gold chain, gold emblem charm, red name strap, and small helmet charm. Customize the case theme as {argument name="case theme" default="red ace pilot mecha armor"}, the main printed name as {argument name="character name" default="CHAR AZNABLE"}, the faction title as {argument name="faction title" default="PRINCIPALITY OF ZEON"}, the lock screen time as {argument name="lock screen time" default="10:30"}, and the phone case color palette as {argument name="color palette" default="metallic red, black, white, and gold"}. content:
Goal: Create a polished product-style photograph of a layered transparent acrylic display postcard, like a miniature exhibition case, featuring an anime catmaid character in a dreamy blue theme.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 product photo, close-up view on a glossy white tabletop, soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, pastel blue and pearl highlights.

Main subject: A freestanding clear acrylic postcard stand made of multiple stacked transparent layers. The back plate is tall with rounded decorative edges and an ornate arch top. The acrylic edges catch light with blue iridescent refractions, giving a premium collectible-goods look.

Character layer: Center the anime character {argument name="character name" default="NOZOMU"}, a cute catmaid girl seated with knees bent, wearing a light blue maid dress with white frills, black ribbon tie, white apron, wrist cuffs, white socks, teal ribbon accents, cat ears, and a gray cat tail with a black bow. She has pale blonde bobbed hair with braids and soft line art. Place a plain opaque pale beige square censor block over the center of her face, covering the facial features while leaving hair, ears, outfit, arms, and pose visible.

Layered acrylic construction: Make the image visibly built from separate flat acrylic parts: exactly 4 main layers — 1 background illustration layer, 1 character cutout layer, 1 foreground decorative ornament layer, and 1 front nameplate layer. Use transparent offsets and visible acrylic thickness to show depth.

Decorations and counted elements: Include exactly 2 small blue cat mascot illustrations floating behind the character, one left and one right. Include exactly 3 front plaques: 1 left circular plaque with ornate cat-ear shape reading {argument name="collection title" default="Dreaming Catmaid"} plus small text "Postcard Collection" and "Limited Edition"; 1 center nameplate reading {argument name="nameplate text" default="NOZOMU"}; and 1 right circular plaque with a blue bow and the quote {argument name="quote text" default="A soft paw, a gentle heart. Always by your side."}. Include exactly 5 prominent dangling or raised clear ornaments around the frame: 1 butterfly ornament at the top center, 1 blue teardrop jewel at upper right, 1 snowflake-like crystal ornament at lower right, and 2 round clear floral rosettes at lower left. Add tiny stars, paw prints, bubbles, and lace-like swirls as subtle printed embellishments.

Background setting: Behind the acrylic stand, place a pastel blue product box on the left with soft blurred readable text matching the collection title, plus a clear cut-glass jar on the right and scattered pearls or glass beads near the base. Keep the background elegant, bright, and softly out of focus.

Visual style: High-end Japanese anime merchandise photography, transparent acrylic, glossy highlights, delicate blue-and-white color palette, dreamy catmaid theme, crystalline reflections, realistic product lighting mixed with crisp 2D anime illustration.

Constraints: No extra characters, no extra plaques, no watermark, no hands holding the item, keep the face covered by the square censor block, preserve the layered postcard-display construction clearly.

content: Create a luxurious pastel product photograph of an open high-end chocolate gift box themed around an ethereal ocean princess. The scene is a dreamy macro-style tabletop arrangement in pale aqua blue, pearl white, blush pink, and champagne gold, with soft diffused lighting, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections, and sparkling bokeh. The open rectangular box is light blue with gold trim and a hinged illustrated lid. On the inside lid, show a delicate anime-style mermaid-like girl with long flowing iridescent white-blonde hair, bare shoulders, pearl necklace, translucent blue shell accents, coral and bubbles around her, and a plain pale square censor/placeholder block covering the center of her face. The lid design has ornate gold corner filigree, small shell motifs, underwater bubbles, pink coral, and elegant gold branding text: Japanese hiragana “のぞむ”, large serif “NOZOMU”, and smaller uppercase “LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION”. In the lower half, show exactly 15 individual luxury chocolates arranged in a 3-row by 5-column gold compartment tray, each in a brown paper cup: row 1 has a faceted blue-purple jewel dome, a pale aqua shell chocolate, a white pearl-topped gold-speckled dome, a blue crystal pyramid bonbon, and a dark blue round bonbon with pink coral sprinkles; row 2 has a white gold-speckled dome, a glossy dark blue-purple orb, a blue dome with pink coral sprinkles, a white ridged shell, and a translucent pale blue faceted gem; row 3 has a pale blue heart, a ribbed aqua shell with small pearls, a turquoise faceted gold-flake jewel, a pale blue dome topped with a pearl, and a teal-gold faceted gem. Surround the box with satin blue ribbons printed with subtle gold lettering and shell icons, pearl strands, glass bubbles, seashells, small pink coral pieces, crystal ornaments, and glittering highlights. Add a small matching square card in front of the box with ornate border and the same branding text “のぞむ”, “NOZOMU”, “LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION”. Use premium Japanese confectionery packaging aesthetics, ultra-detailed textures, photorealistic product photography mixed with soft anime illustration on the lid, elegant composition, no extra text, no watermark. Optional custom details: {argument name="brand name" default="NOZOMU"}, {argument name="Japanese brand text" default="のぞむ"}, {argument name="collection subtitle" default="LIMITED CHOCOLAT COLLECTION"}, {argument name="main color palette" default="pale aqua blue, pearl white, blush pink, champagne gold"}, {argument name="lid character" default="ethereal ocean princess with iridescent white-blonde hair"}.

content: Using the character in the attached image, create a super cute fictional candy package that would look at home in a Japanese convenience store. The character's name is '{argument name="character name" default="Name"}'. Use this name naturally in the text elements. Observe the character's colors, outfit, and vibe to devise a matching flavor and catchy product name. The overall direction should be fluffy, sparkly, sweet, and dreamy. Use a base of {argument name="colors" default="pink, light blue, lavender, and mint"} with motifs like hearts, ribbons, and lace. Include text in Japanese: a product name based on the character, flavor, and a short catchphrase. The final image should look like a professional product shot on a desk with some candy pieces spilled around.

content: Create a minimalist luxury fragrance product shot on a clean white studio background. Center a single futuristic perfume bottle shaped like a perfectly round polished chrome sphere with a flat circular base and a short cylindrical chrome spray cap on top. The bottle should look highly reflective and mirror-like, with smooth black-and-white studio reflections curving across the spherical surface, a dark soft central reflection, crisp metallic rim highlights, and subtle grounding shadow beneath. The sprayer has a tiny nozzle aperture visible near the top front, with a vertical black reflective strip running down the cap. Add engraved metallic text across the front of the sphere: {argument name="fragrance name" default="ATOMIUM AIR™"} in thin uppercase modern sans-serif lettering, and a smaller tagline beneath it reading {argument name="tagline" default="Brussels, bottled in the future"}. The composition is symmetrical, premium, quiet, and hyper-realistic, like a high-end cosmetics advertisement inspired by Belgian futurism, Art Deco chrome, rain-slick Brussels, and spacecraft-like design. Use only one bottle, one cap, one base, and two visible text lines; no people, no props, no colored background, no extra labels, no watermark.

content: Create a photorealistic product mockup of a cute Japanese tear-off daily desk calendar standing on a warm wooden table in soft morning light. The calendar is an A-frame tabletop block with thick cream paper pages and a textured off-white binding strip along the top, viewed from a slightly front-left angle. The visible page has a pastel watercolor anime design in mint, cream, peach, and pale blue, with delicate paper texture, scalloped frames, tiny daisies, and a small bow ornament near the top. On the right half of the page, illustrate one sweet original anime girl: blonde peach-pink curly twin-tail hair, large sparkling aqua eyes, rosy cheeks, a gentle smile, chin resting on both hands, wearing a mint green dress with tiny white and yellow flowers, a frilly blue-white collar, scrunchie bracelets, and blue ribbon bows plus small flower clips in her hair. On the left half of the page, include exactly five text elements: top small label 「うちの子日めくり」, large date “{argument name="date" default="5/24"}”, weekday “{argument name="weekday" default="日曜日"}”, character name “{argument name="character name" default="のぞむ"}”, and a rounded cloud message box reading “{argument name="daily message" default="あなたのペースでね"}”. Use elegant Japanese typography, with the date in large teal serif numerals and the other text in soft brown and teal. Surround the calendar with cozy desk props: exactly one mint floral pen lying diagonally in the foreground, one glass vase with white and blue flowers on the left, one white lace cloth under the pen, one softly blurred glass container on the right, and small out-of-focus white blossoms in the lower right foreground. Keep the mood gentle, handmade, feminine, airy, and nostalgic, with shallow depth of field, warm highlights, realistic shadows, and no watermark or extra text.

content: Create a square 1:1 close-up food advertisement photo of a cheesy quesadilla, shot in warm golden light with shallow depth of field. The foreground shows two stacked triangular halves of a toasted flour tortilla quesadilla on a dark rustic plate, cut open so the filling is highly visible: browned spiced ground beef, glossy sauce, and abundant melted yellow-white cheese stretching in long strands between the top and bottom pieces and dripping over the edges. The tortilla surface should be crisp with scattered golden-brown char marks and soft blistering. Use a dark wooden table background, softly blurred, with a small out-of-focus bowl of greens and cherry tomatoes in the upper right. Overlay energetic Japanese handwritten brush typography: exactly 3 text elements, consisting of 1 small orange handwritten line at the upper left reading {argument name="top handwritten text" default="チーズたっぷり"} with a curved underline flourish, 1 large bold white brush-script headline across the upper center reading {argument name="main headline text" default="ケサディーヤ"}, and 1 smaller white handwritten note at the lower left reading {argument name="bottom handwritten text" default="とろ〜り チーズ"}. Add exactly 4 orange doodle accents: a thick orange brush underline sweeping beneath the main headline, two short orange emphasis marks near the lower left edge, three short orange rays near the upper right of the headline, and a small orange heart beside the lower-left note. Make the typography look like casual hand-painted Japanese marker lettering, slightly imperfect and organic. Keep the food hyper-realistic, appetizing, high contrast, with saturated cheese yellows, rich beef browns, and a cozy restaurant-menu feel. No people, no logos, no watermarks, no extra text.

content:
Use the attached character sheet as a STRICT design reference. Do not change the face, hairstyle, eye shape, or proportions under any circumstances.

■ Purpose: To fully commercialize the character as a Japanese "{argument name="product name" default="chibi eraser product"}" and create realistic packaged product photos like those sold in stationery stores or gashapon machines.

■ Concept: "Bagged chibi eraser products sold in 100-yen shops and stationery stores."

■ Eraser Main Body: (Maintain exact same specs as before) - Strongly deformed chibi character - Thick block shape - Fully matte rubber material - Fine particles/powder/chips/wear present - Print misalignment/color variations - Random configuration of 50+ items.

■ Packaging (CRITICAL): - Small transparent plastic bag (OPP bag) - Paper header at the top (with hanging hole) - Slightly cheap printing on the header (slight misalignment/ink unevenness) - Wrinkled vinyl, slightly cloudy, sticking to contents due to static - Some air inside causing bulging - Light warping on the sealed section.

■ Graphic Design: - Japanese children's stationery style - Pop and colorful ({argument name="color theme" default="pink, yellow, light blue"} base) - Handwritten-style or rounded fonts - Product logo (original okay) - Text like 'Mini-Keshi' or 'Chibi-Keshi' - Stars, hearts, sparkle decorations.

■ Informational Elements (Enhanced Realism): - JAN code (barcode) - 'Ages 6 and up' - 'Not edible' warning - 'Total X types' or 'Randomly included' - Small company name (fictional) - MADE IN JAPAN or CHINA markings.

■ Composition: - Packaging is main in center of frame - A few spilled erasers around - 1 or 2 out of the bag - A fingertip picking one up for effect - Natural feel with some frame-out.

■ Rare Element: - Mix in one special individual with fluorescent color or gradient - Place in a prominent position to guide the viewer's gaze.

■ Lighting: - Bright natural light (slightly high-key) - Soft shadows - Cleanliness like a product catalog photo.

■ Camera: - Macro-leaning - Shallow depth of field - Sharp center.

■ Background: - White to pastel table - Subtle dots or pop patterns - Simple and clean.

■ Prohibited: - Plastic feel - glossy expression - Overly high-end texture (cheapness is correct) - Overly perfect printing.

■ Output: - A level indistinguishable from real products - Reality like items found in convenience stores or 100-yen shops - Quality that makes people on SNS say 'I want this.'

content:
Goal: Create a futuristic ecommerce product overview poster for {argument name="product type" default="sheer black stockings"}, styled like a high-tech product launch page.

Canvas: Square 1:1 composition, glossy silver-gray studio background with soft gradients, faint transparent HUD lines, corner brackets, neon blue and violet accents, subtle sci-fi interface overlays, premium clean lighting.

Layout: Right side features the main fashion model occupying about 60% of the image. Left side contains the product information panel, product packaging, rolled stocking display, fabric stretch demo image, and a feature list card. Keep the composition balanced, luxurious, and minimal.

Main subject: A seated adult female fashion model on a metallic silver cube, wearing sheer black stockings, black high heels with small gold toe accents, and a fitted black dress with long sleeves, white pointed collar, and a small gold brooch. She sits with legs crossed to clearly show the stockings’ sheer texture and slim fit. Long brown hair, elegant pose, one hand near her hair. The face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur for anonymity.

Product elements: Include exactly 3 visible product/demo elements on the left: 1 tall translucent silver product box with a silhouette of a leg wearing stocking, 1 rolled black stocking with a loose sheer section extending forward, and 1 inset close-up photo showing two hands stretching the stocking fabric horizontally.

Text content: Large English headline at upper left: “PRODUCT OVERVIEW”. Below it, show the Chinese product slogan {argument name="Chinese slogan" default="薄透丝袜，显瘦有质感"}. Under that, add the English descriptor line: “Sheer Texture / Slim Fit / Soft Matte Glow”. Use modern condensed sans-serif typography in dark gray.

Feature list card: At bottom left, include exactly 5 feature rows with small circular line icons and English labels: 1) Sheer Texture, 2) Slim Fit, 3) Soft Matte Glow, 4) High Elasticity, 5) Commuter Styling. Use thin dividers and a translucent frosted-glass panel.

Visual style: Premium fashion-tech advertising, photorealistic model and product, clean futuristic UI details, soft reflections on floor and cube, black stockings rendered semi-transparent with subtle matte glow, elegant commercial lighting, sharp focus on legs and product materials.

Constraints: No extra feature rows, no extra product demos, no watermark, no messy background text, keep all typography legible, keep the model modestly posed and fashion-catalog oriented.

content: Create a realistic high-end product photo of an anime-style action figure sealed inside a collectible retail box. The figure is {argument name="character name" default="EMA"}, a cheerful original girl character with very long flowing {argument name="hair color" default="orange-red"} hair and two front braids, but her face is intentionally covered by a centered square blur censor block. She is posed dynamically on one leg with her right hand raised in a V-sign peace pose and her other hand on her hip. Outfit details: exactly 7 main clothing pieces — yellow cropped jacket with orange sun motifs, white sleeveless top, orange high-waisted shorts, brown belt, yellow thigh-high socks, orange sneakers, and an orange backpack. Place her in a clear molded plastic blister tray with a round transparent stand at the bottom. Include exactly 3 visible accessories in separate molded compartments on the right side: a black smartphone with an orange case, a small orange spiral notebook with a sun emblem, and a matching orange pen. Packaging: tall rectangular premium toy box photographed at a slight front-right angle, white and orange gradient cardboard with gold trim, rounded clear window, star and sparkle decorations, and an elegant orange top label. Use accurate readable package text: top center says "AIDear" with "Collection" beneath it, top right says "No.001", bottom nameplate says large "EMA" with smaller "Researcher Edition" beneath, and a gold circular seal at lower right says "LIMITED EDITION". The overall style should resemble a real Japanese collectible action figure package, glossy plastic reflections, warm studio lighting, sharp product photography, orange-and-gold color theme, clean gray background, no extra figures, no extra accessories, no watermark.

content:
Create a white t-shirt product mockup (flat lay, front view, plain white background).

The t-shirt design uses black line art only. No color fill. No shading. White shirt throughout.

Illustration style: hand-drawn with a soft pencil or crayon. Lines are slightly wobbly and uneven, with inconsistent pressure — some strokes faint, some darker. Outlines do not always close perfectly. The overall impression is a casual, childlike sketch — imperfect but charming. Minimal detail. No clean vector lines. No digital precision.

The t-shirt has four printed zones:

TOP CENTER: Reproduce the festival logo from the first attached image exactly as-is — do not alter the font, layout, or graphic style in any way. Place it prominently at the top center of the shirt. Make it large enough to read clearly. Do NOT apply the hand-drawn or yuru-kyara style to this logo.

TOP RIGHT: A hand-drawn jagged speech bubble (spiky, explosive edges — like a shouting manga effect), slightly smaller than the character illustration. Inside the bubble, write "{argument name="dialogue" default="[Insert dialogue here]"}" in clumsy, uneven hand-lettered characters. The bubble and text should feel comic and energetic.

MIDDLE: Redraw the character from the attached image in a loose, casual, yuru-kyara style — simplified, childlike, charmingly imperfect. Use the attached image as the sole reference for pose, expression, and content. Draw the character smaller — occupying no more than 40% of the shirt's height. Leave generous white space around the figure. The speech bubble may overlap with the top portion of the character illustration. Do not shrink the character to avoid overlap.

BOTTOM: The artist name "{argument name="artist name" default="[Insert artist name here]"}" hand-lettered in uneven, shaky characters — as if written slowly and clumsily by hand with a pencil.

Keep all elements well-spaced and balanced. Clean, minimal, no background decoration.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base photo, retouch it into a clean, professional lifestyle shot while preserving the bouquet, clear glass vase, white ribbon text “JUST FOR YOU,” and the exact arrangement with 4 visible peach roses. Brighten the entire scene with warm natural sunlight coming through the window, improve exposure and color, make the greenery and roses look fresh and vivid, and add a soft shallow-depth-of-field look to the outdoor view. Neaten the composition by centering the vase and bouquet more elegantly, removing distracting table items such as the 2 gray placemats and dark chair backs, and making the tablecloth look freshly ironed, smoother, cleaner, and softly lit. Keep the window, sheer curtains, and cozy indoor setting, but make the result look polished, airy, and photorealistic, as if shot for a home decor or flower delivery advertisement.

content:
Goal: Create a wide brand identity and advertising creative overview for a minimalist Nordic skincare brand named {argument name="brand name" default="FJÄLL"}, showing a complete campaign system on a clean white studio background.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 presentation board with a lot of negative space, soft warm off-white background, centered composition. Use muted Scandinavian colors: stone gray, cream, beige, sage green, charcoal blue-gray, and natural skin tones. Lighting is soft, diffused, premium, and editorial.

Layout: Arrange exactly 11 discrete tiles in a refined grid. Top row contains 3 larger brand assets: 1) a minimal circular mountain-line logo with the word FJÄLL and small subtext, 2) an alternate logo with a small abstract mountain/stone icon above the word FJÄLL and the tagline “NORDIC SKINCARE”, 3) a square product still-life photo of one dark gray skincare tube standing upright on a pale stone surface with a rock prop. Bottom row contains exactly 8 campaign mockups, evenly spaced and aligned: 1) square lifestyle product photo with hands holding the tube beside a cream product information card, 2) square close-up of a gray clay/mineral cream smear on stone with tiny text “MINERAL TEXTURE”, 3) vertical application tutorial tile showing cream being applied to fingers with a simple header, 4) vertical dew/balm hand-care tile showing cream rubbed onto the back of a hand, 5) square hero ingredient tile with the tube standing among stones, leaves, and three circular ingredient callouts, 6) vertical social media video interface mockup with a hand holding the product, visible play/engagement UI icons along the side and bottom, 7) vertical ad poster with the product tube, botanical sprigs, rock props, and headline text near the bottom, 8) tall mobile website or landing-page mockup with a clean navigation bar, product detail blocks, and an application photo.

Subject details: The product is a single squeeze tube labeled {argument name="product label" default="FJÄLL"}, matte dark blue-gray packaging, white minimalist typography, small circular emblem, premium cosmetic proportions. The skincare texture is thick, mineral, clay-like, pale gray-beige. Hands should look natural, softly lit, and elegant. Props include smooth stones, mineral rocks, small green leaves, neutral linen or plaster surfaces, and shallow shadows.

Text content: Include readable brand text “FJÄLL” on logos and packaging, “NORDIC SKINCARE” as a tagline, and campaign/product text suggesting {argument name="product name" default="Midnight Solstice"}, {argument name="benefit phrase" default="Performance in every touch."}, mineral texture, application, dew-bomb, and ingredient callouts. Keep small body copy mostly decorative but plausible, clean, and aligned.

Visual style: Luxury skincare art direction, minimal Swiss editorial layout, soft product photography, airy whitespace, muted natural palette, understated typography, commercial creative portfolio look. Make the entire board appear like a polished generated ad-material batch preview rather than a single ad.

Constraints: Use exactly 11 visible tiles total, exactly 3 on the top row and exactly 8 on the bottom row. Do not add extra products beyond the one tube design. Avoid bright colors, clutter, heavy shadows, glossy plastic, cartoon style, or watermarks.

content:
Goal: Create an ultra-premium product photograph of a thick, transparent multilayer acrylic block containing a richly detailed 2D anime collage, as if a luxury acrylic collectible has been manufactured from an illustration.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 portrait product photo, close-up three-quarter view from slightly above, the acrylic block standing upright on a lace-covered tabletop. Use shallow depth of field with a dark violet studio background, purple bokeh lights, crystal beads, pearls, faceted gems, and soft glowing candles in the distance.

Main object: A large rectangular clear acrylic block, about 5–7 cm thick, with polished beveled edges, visible stacked transparent layers, refractive side walls, internal reflections, caustics, and glossy highlights. The front face is covered with delicate gold and white foil-like printed decorations, while the anime artwork appears suspended across many internal acrylic layers for a deep 3D collage effect.

Central artwork: Inside the block, show {argument name="character name" default="an elegant faceless anime heroine"} wearing a dark purple and black fantasy kimono-style gown with flowing translucent sleeves, ribbon-like fabric, lavender floral ornaments, and long black-purple hair spreading through the composition. Her face is intentionally obscured by a small soft-edged purple square censor block centered over the head. She holds or is surrounded by glowing paper lanterns. Behind her, include a radiant violet moon or circular magical halo, starry night textures, sparkling mist, and an umbrella-like fan silhouette. Overall mood: mysterious, romantic, luxurious, nocturnal.

Color and lighting: Dominant palette of deep violet, amethyst, indigo, black, lavender, transparent crystal, and metallic gold. Strong internal purple glow from behind the character, rim lighting through the acrylic edges, glitter particles, prismatic refractions, and highly realistic product-photography reflections.

Decorative printed elements: Use exactly 7 prominent decorative motif groups on the acrylic surface: 1) gold and white butterflies scattered near the top and lower front, 2) floral garlands and blossoms along the left and bottom edges, 3) ornate filigree frames and corner borders, 4) tiny stars and sparkles throughout, 5) hanging lantern illustrations integrated with the character, 6) a pink heart gem sticker on the right side, 7) crescent moon and chain ornaments near the bottom left.

Floating creatures: Include exactly 3 red goldfish inside the acrylic scene: one on the left side near the character’s sleeve, one mid-right near the character’s hand, and one larger goldfish in the lower-right foreground. Make them appear suspended in different acrylic layers with different depths and refractions.

Visible text printed on the object: Add ornate gold script and small serif typography as part of the premium packaging design. Include {argument name="main title text" default="Eternal Night"} at the top left, Chinese vertical text {argument name="vertical label text" default="永恒的夜"} on the left side, the word {argument name="decorative script text" default="Beautiful"} in large cursive gold at lower left, a small serial label "No. 5201314" at upper right, and a small quote plaque at lower right reading {argument name="quote text" default="You are The one Makes me Smile"}. Additional tiny decorative microtext may be present but should be secondary and not dominate.

Surface setting: Place the acrylic block on ornate white lace fabric with scattered purple crystals, pink rhinestones, pearl strands, and glossy beads in the foreground. The surroundings should feel like a luxury collectible product shoot, not a flat illustration.

Style and quality: Hyper-realistic macro product photography combined with anime illustration trapped inside acrylic; extremely sharp front details, realistic transparent material, layered parallax, high contrast purple lighting, premium handmade merchandise aesthetic, no watermark, no extra characters, no packaging box, no hands.

content: Create a luxurious, photorealistic official character-themed whole cake product shot based on {argument name="character name" default="Nozomu"}. content:
Goal: Create a vertical comparison image showing the same appetizing fried calamari cone rendered in two stacked panels, like a side-by-side model comparison but arranged top and bottom.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, 768 x 768 style composition, split horizontally into exactly 2 equal panels. Use a clean bright {argument name="background color" default="vivid ocean blue"} studio background with a subtle gradient; the top panel is slightly deeper blue and the bottom panel slightly lighter blue.

Layout: Top panel contains one floating paper cone of fried calamari centered slightly left, tilted upright, surrounded by airborne crumbs and flying calamari rings. Bottom panel contains the same paper cone larger and closer to camera, centered slightly left, with a few flying rings and a lemon wedge. Add a white italic serif label reading {argument name="top label" default="GPT image 2"} near the lower-right of the top panel, and another white italic serif label reading {argument name="bottom label" default="Nano Banana 2"} in the lower-right corner of the bottom panel.

Subject details: The food is golden crispy fried calamari rings with rough crunchy breading, photographed as high-speed food advertising. Use exactly 2 lemon wedges total: 1 tucked into the top cone at the upper right, and 1 floating near the upper-right of the bottom panel. Use exactly 34 prominent calamari rings total: in the top panel, 18 rings, with 10 piled inside the cone and 8 flying around it; in the bottom panel, 16 rings, with 13 piled inside the cone and 3 flying outside it. Add many tiny orange breadcrumb particles and a few broken batter fragments suspended in midair, especially dense around the top cone.

Packaging: Each cone is made from off-white faux newspaper paper printed in blue ink. The main circular logo on the cone reads {argument name="brand logo text" default="FISH & LOVE"} with a small fish illustration above it. Large blue newspaper headline text on the wrapper reads {argument name="wrapper headline" default="From the sea to love."}. Include smaller decorative seafood-newspaper details, thin blue rule lines, tiny columns of filler text, simple fish and lemon illustrations, and the phrase "Simple ingredients, unforgettable taste." on the wrapper. The top cone is slightly smaller with more dramatic exploding crumbs; the bottom cone is larger, more polished, and has clearer wrapper text.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic commercial food photography, crisp texture, sharp focus on calamari, high-speed freeze-frame motion, bright natural highlights, appetizing warm orange-gold food color against saturated blue, shallow depth of field, clean advertising composition, no people, no plates, no extra objects, no watermark.

content: Create a cinematic premium product advertising image for {argument name="brand name" default="MyThos"}, a luxury yerba mate package design inspired by Paraguayan forest legends. Scene: a dark rustic wooden tabletop against a smoky warm brown studio backdrop, dramatic low-key lighting, soft shadows, amber highlights, hyper-realistic commercial photography. Arrange exactly 7 visible product objects from left to right: 1 large front-facing black matte yerba mate bag, 1 narrow side-facing black bag showing side branding, 1 rear-facing black bag showing nutrition facts and barcode, 1 three-quarter angled black bag showing the front and right side, 1 tall green Stanley-style thermos with stainless steel cap on the far right, 1 dark worn mate gourd in front of the thermos filled with loose yerba, and 1 curved metal bombilla straw emerging from the gourd. Packaging details: all bags are glossy crinkled black kraft pouches with gold foil typography, ornate botanical borders, small tree emblem at the top, subtle forest leaves near the bottom, and mythical guardian character art. The main front bag should prominently read "{argument name="product name" default="MyThos"}" in large elegant serif gold lettering, with Spanish text "YERBA MATE", "ELABORADA CON PALO", and the slogan "{argument name="slogan" default="LEYENDAS QUE VIVEN"}". The front artwork shows exactly 2 legendary forest guardian figures, one straw-covered Pombero-like figure and one long-haired pale Pora-like figure, standing in a dark jungle scene; include a round gold seal near the bottom and the label "POMBERO & PÓRA" plus "GUARDIANES DEL MONTE". The back-facing bag includes a centered nutrition information panel, exactly 3 small circular claim icons above it, paragraph text, a barcode at the bottom, and gold ornamental trim. The side-facing bag includes vertical layout branding, a small tree icon, short descriptive Spanish copy, and "POMBERO & PÓRA" near the bottom. Color palette: black, deep forest green, aged bronze, antique gold, warm brown wood, subtle cream text. Style: ultra-detailed, photorealistic, premium beverage packaging mockup, sharp focus on products, shallow depth of field, no people, no hands, no extra props, no watermark. Use {argument name="package weight" default="1kg"} on the front lower corner and make the thermos label read {argument name="thermos label" default="STANLEY SINCE 1913"}.

content: Create a photorealistic product-display image of exactly 4 collectible anime idol figurines posed inside a dark glass display cabinet, arranged in a 2-by-2 grid with black metal dividers between the four compartments. Use a cinematic warm spotlight from above in each compartment, glossy reflections on the glass, shallow depth of field, and a premium museum-diorama look. Each figurine sits or kneels on a circular polished wooden pedestal, with a softly blurred doll-like face and highly detailed glossy resin skin, hair, clothing, ribbons, gloves, stockings, and metallic accessories. The overall theme is {argument name="display theme" default="luxury fantasy idol figures in antique glass cases"}. Include exactly 4 figurines: top left is a purple-haired twin-tail idol in a white, black, and lavender frilled stage outfit, seated sideways with one hand on the pedestal and the other arm extended outward, wearing thigh-high stockings and garter details; top right is a blue-haired curled-twin-tail idol in a dark navy plaid school-uniform-inspired outfit, kneeling on the pedestal with one arm raised in a peace-sign gesture, wearing gloves and layered ribbons; bottom left is a pink-haired pastel idol in a pale pink frilly dress, seated with one leg folded and one hand touching her head, with blue-and-pink stockings and delicate bows; bottom right is a short white-and-blue-haired idol in a white, silver, and cyan outfit with small wing-like shoulder details and a star hair ornament, seated cross-legged while pointing toward the viewer. Surround the figures with antique props inside the cases: framed art prints, small books, vintage cameras, glass bottles, dried flowers in vases, a brass armillary sphere, a lantern with a candle, and a large antique clock. Keep the environment dark brown and black with warm amber highlights, realistic glass reflections, subtle dust and scratches, and a high-end collectible photography style. content: Create a luxurious pastel pink limited-edition chocolate gift box product photo for {argument name="character name" default="Hana na chan"}. The scene is a dreamy, romantic flat-lay/angled close-up on a lace-covered table with soft warm studio lighting, shallow depth of field, pearl and satin accents, and an elegant rose-gold and blush color palette. Show an open rectangular chocolatier box: the upper lid fills the top half and is printed like a premium keepsake package with ornate thin gold border lines, delicate cherry-blossom clusters in the corners, and a large portrait-style photo of a cute young girl with a short pale-blonde bob haircut, a pink flower hair clip, a white blouse with tiny pink floral embroidery and lace collar, black suspenders, and one arm raised making a peace sign; place a simple opaque square privacy mosaic over the face. On the lid, include refined gold typography reading "花奈ちゃん" with a small blossom mark, "HANA NA CHAN", "ÉDITION LIMITÉE", and "CHOCOLAT DE RÊVE". Add a large satin bow at the upper right of the lid with dangling gold charm beads and a small flower ornament. The lower half of the box contains exactly 10 chocolates arranged in a 2-by-5 grid in individual dark brown fluted cups inside glossy gold compartments: 1 pink flower-shaped chocolate with a gold center, 2 faceted ruby-pink heart gem chocolate, 3 cream round ridged chocolate topped with a small pink flower, 4 pink rose-swirl chocolate, 5 dark round chocolate dusted with fine gold sprinkles, 6 square milk chocolate engraved with floral line art, 7 round pink striped chocolate with white drizzle and tiny sprinkles, 8 faceted blush-pink dome chocolate, 9 square dark chocolate engraved with a gold bee or floral motif, 10 pale pink heart chocolate with pearly sheen. Around the box, include soft props: lace fabric, pale pink flower petals, a small cream gift card at lower left with cursive "Hana na chan" and Japanese-style decorative text, a vintage gold mirror edge, pearls, and pink ribbon. Style should look like a high-end Japanese kawaii chocolatier advertisement, photorealistic but slightly fantasy-polished, with crisp packaging details, embossed textures, metallic gold accents, delicate blossoms, and no extra chocolates or extra text beyond the specified lettering.

content:
Create a realistic premium wall clock inspired entirely by the uploaded illustration. The clock must reinterpret the artwork’s atmosphere, character design, emotional tone, color palette, symbols, architecture, fashion, lighting, fantasy or sci-fi elements, and worldbuilding into a highly original cuckoo-clock-like hanging clock design. Do not create a generic antique clock. The entire silhouette, carvings, ornaments, moving parts, pendulum, decorative windows, roof structure, numerals, hands, textures, and materials must feel naturally born from the illustration’s universe.

Fantasy shrine maiden themes may inspire lacquered wood, spiritual crests, torii-inspired framing, glowing talismans, hanging bells, sakura carvings, layered shrine architecture, elegant red-and-black lacquer textures, and softly illuminated paper windows. Futuristic or android-inspired illustrations may create holographic clock faces, segmented mechanical armor panels, glowing circuitry, transparent crystal housings, floating rings, neon edge lighting, animated digital pendulums, and sleek asymmetrical structures. Cute pastel worlds may inspire rounded soft silhouettes, candy-like decorations, transparent ornaments, heart motifs, glossy enamel surfaces, plush textures, and dreamy fairytale styling.

The cuckoo-clock-style opening should contain a small animated figure, spirit, mechanical bird, tiny mascot, or symbolic object derived from the illustration itself. The pendulum and moving ornaments should visually match the worldbuilding and emotional tone of the artwork. Clock hands and numerals must be uniquely designed to fit the illustration instead of using standard designs.

If the uploaded illustration contains a character, place the same character naturally beneath or beside the wall clock, looking upward toward it with curiosity or admiration while preserving the original face, hairstyle, proportions, colors, clothing style, and personality. Bright cinematic lighting, ultra detailed craftsmanship, realistic materials, premium fantasy interior photography, elegant shadows, highly detailed reflections, masterpiece quality.

Futuristic or android-inspired illustrations may create holographic clock faces, segmented mechanical armor panels, glowing circuitry, transparent crystal housings, floating rings, neon edge lighting, animated digital pendulums, and sleek asymmetrical structures. Cute pastel worlds may inspire rounded soft silhouettes, candy-like decorations, transparent ornaments, heart motifs, glossy enamel surfaces, plush textures, and dreamy fairytale styling.

The cuckoo-clock-style opening should contain a small animated figure, spirit, mechanical bird, tiny mascot, or symbolic object derived from the illustration itself. The pendulum and moving ornaments should visually match the worldbuilding and emotional tone of the artwork. Clock hands and numerals must be uniquely designed to fit the illustration instead of using standard designs.

If the uploaded illustration contains a character, place the same character naturally beneath or beside the wall clock, looking upward toward it with curiosity or admiration while preserving the original face, hairstyle, proportions, colors, clothing style, and personality. Bright cinematic lighting, ultra detailed craftsmanship, realistic materials, premium fantasy interior photography, elegant shadows, highly detailed reflections, masterpiece quality.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic smartphone-style photo of an open trading-card collection album lying on a warm wooden table, showing a page of custom anime character cards in clear plastic sleeves.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 photo, slightly angled top-down perspective, shallow depth of field. The album fills the lower two-thirds of the frame; the background tabletop is softly blurred.

Main scene: An open black card binder with the left inside cover empty and matte, and the right page holding a transparent plastic card sleeve sheet. The sleeve page contains exactly 3 visible long horizontal trading cards stacked vertically, with one empty transparent pocket below them. The plastic should have glossy reflections, seams, dotted borders, and slight wrinkles.

Card design: Each card is a slightly elongated horizontal collectible card with a black-and-gold frame, neon anime artwork, Japanese text, a numbered circle at the top left, a character name band along the bottom, a small gold crest/emblem at lower left, and three stat boxes at lower right labeled HP, ATK, and DEF in green, red, and blue. Make the cards look like premium fan-made game cards from {argument name="club name" default="SynClub"}.

Count and card contents: Show exactly 3 cards:
1. Top card: number 1, cyberpunk blue-purple city background, an anime girl with twin tails reaching toward the viewer, a small sign saying “WELCOME TO SynClub” and another saying “CONNECT THE FUTURE”; Japanese headline text across the top; name line reads “レティシア・エル”; stats read HP 4200, ATK 3800, DEF 2900. Add a soft square blur over the character’s face as if privacy-censored.
2. Middle card: number 2, two cute anime girls close together, one blonde and one dark purple-haired, in a dreamy pink-purple night city or café scene; Japanese headline across the top; name line reads “ココア&ショコラ”; stats read HP 4100, ATK 3600, DEF 2900.
3. Bottom card: number 3, blonde idol-style anime girl performing on a neon stage with purple lights and heart symbols; Japanese headline across the top; name line reads “燦 める”; stats read HP 4100, ATK 3700, DEF 2800.

Background objects: Include exactly 4 blurred tabletop objects: a black TV remote control near the upper left, a small stack of cards or papers at the far left edge, a dark cup or tumbler near the upper right, and a small shiny blue-red object near the top-right edge.

Visual style: Photorealistic casual tabletop photography, warm indoor lighting, natural lens blur, realistic wood grain, mild glare on the plastic sleeves, high detail on the binder and cards but slightly imperfect AI-like tiny printed text. The overall mood is a collector casually showing off an anime card album.

Constraints: Keep the album page and the 3 cards clearly readable, preserve the exact count of 3 filled card pockets and 1 empty pocket, avoid extra cards in the binder page, avoid watermark or UI overlays.

content:
Goal: Create a dreamy seaside anime-themed cafe brand mockup for {argument name="cafe name" default="泡沫の光 カフェ"}, using a soft pastel lavender and pink palette, elegant floral borders, seashell motifs, and a gentle ocean-sunset atmosphere.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 composition, photorealistic product display with anime illustration printed on objects, shallow depth of field, warm backlit sunset glow, soft bokeh, high-detail textures.

Setting: A wooden outdoor cafe table on a beach terrace at sunset. The ocean fills the background with sparkling waves and a low sun near the horizon. Add blurred pastel flowers behind the display, mainly white, blush pink, and lavender, with a romantic coastal cafe mood.

Main branded elements: Show exactly 5 visible cafe merchandise/display pieces arranged on the table: 1 tall pastel paper shopping bag on the left with rope handles, 1 large takeaway coffee cup in the center with a white plastic lid, 1 upright acrylic menu sign on a small wooden base on the right, 1 transparent acrylic QR-code card lying flat in the front-left foreground, and 1 rectangular serving tray in the front-right foreground. Each item should share the same delicate lavender floral pattern and ocean-inspired branding.

Character illustration: On the paper bag, cup, and tray, print a circular anime illustration of {argument name="character description" default="a soft blonde anime girl in a pale blue summer dress, sitting by the sea, with wavy hair, gentle eyes, and a shy hand-near-face pose"}. The illustration should look watercolor-like, airy, and pastel, framed by tiny flowers and sea motifs.

Text content: Use Japanese branding text on the bag and cup: 「泡沫の光 カフェ」 with “- CAFÉ -” below it. The upright menu sign should have the heading “MENU” and a small shell icon, with exactly 5 menu items and prices: 「潮風ラテ」650, 「桜シェルソーダ」680, 「星屑クリームソーダ」700, 「乙女のベリーパフェ」720, 「夢見るレアチーズ」660. The flat acrylic card should contain a QR-code area and small decorative Japanese cafe text, but it may be partially unreadable due to perspective and reflections.

Foreground props: Add exactly 2 small seaside props on the tray: 1 pale pink ridged shell-shaped dessert or shell ornament, and 1 small pink starfish beside it. Keep them neatly placed on the branded tray.

Visual style: Soft romantic product photography, pastel anime cafe aesthetic, pearlescent highlights, translucent acrylic reflections, creamy lighting, elegant floral line art, delicate shells, starfish, and ocean foam motifs. Use realistic shadows on the wooden table and a softly blurred background.

Constraints: Keep the composition clean and premium, avoid extra people, avoid modern corporate logos, avoid clutter, preserve the exact count of 5 branded display pieces, 5 menu items, and 2 foreground seaside props.

content: Create a photorealistic luxury product rendering of an exploded mechanical dive watch, centered on a {argument name="watch brand" default="Rolex"} {argument name="watch model" default="Submariner"} in stainless steel with a black dial and black ceramic bezel. Canvas is landscape 4:3, dark charcoal-to-black studio background, dramatic softbox reflections, ultra sharp macro detail, premium advertising look, no people. Composition: the fully assembled watch occupies the right half of the image at a slight three-quarter angle, with a brushed oyster-style metal bracelet continuing upward and downward out of frame; the crown is visible on the right side, the serrated bezel has white minute markings and large numerals 10, 20, 30, and 50, and the dial shows luminous round, rectangular, and triangle indices, Mercedes-style hour hand, minute hand, seconds hand, and small white printed dial text including the brand crown logo, brand name, model name, depth rating, and certification lines. On the left half, show an exploded vertical stack of exactly 7 separated watch components aligned in perspective: 1) a transparent domed sapphire crystal floating at the top, 2) a black rotating bezel insert with white markings beneath it, 3) a dark chapter/rehaut ring with tiny engraved brand text, 4) the black watch dial with luminous markers and printed brand/model text, 5) three separate silver hands floating below the dial, 6) a detailed mechanical movement with jewels, screws, gears, and bridges, and 7) the lower steel caseback/case ring at the bottom. Between the exploded stack and the complete watch, show a partially separated circular movement and case module tilted open, exposing gears, gold-toned wheels, ruby jewels, screws, and a rotor with a small gold crown emblem, as if the mechanism is being pulled into the watch. Materials: polished and brushed stainless steel, black glossy ceramic, transparent glass edge highlights, engraved ridges, high-contrast reflections, precise machining, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field but all main parts crisp. Text should be legible where possible and resemble authentic luxury watch dial typography, using {argument name="dial color" default="black"}, {argument name="metal finish" default="brushed stainless steel"}, and {argument name="background color" default="deep black"}. Constraints: make the image look like a high-end technical product visualization, not a diagram; no captions, no labels outside the watch, no watermark, no extra watches, no hands or tools.

content:
Goal: Create a luxury square advertising collage for a futuristic wristwatch brand, showing one premium chronograph watch across four elemental dimensions. Use the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="NOXEN"} and the monogram {argument name="brand monogram" default="N"}.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image divided into exactly 4 equal panels in a clean 2x2 grid, separated by thin white divider lines. Each panel is a cinematic product poster with dramatic lighting, high contrast, sharp watch detail, and premium commercial photography realism.

Overall subject: A masculine luxury stainless-steel chronograph wristwatch with integrated metal bracelet, octagonal/rounded bezel with small screws, black dial, three subdials, baton hour markers, central hands, crown and pushers on the right side, and subtle brand text on the dial. The watch should remain recognizable as the same model in all 4 panels while material color and environment change.

Panel count and details: Exactly 4 distinct watch posters:
1. Top-left panel: matte black watch in a dark smoky void, surrounded by black dust, volcanic ash, floating debris, and mist. Monochrome black-and-charcoal palette with silver highlights. Place the monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="darkness tagline" default="ENGINEERED IN DARKNESS"} near the bottom center.
2. Top-right panel: polished gold watch surrounded by a dramatic splash of liquid gold, bubbles, and warm amber reflections. Black background with intense golden highlights. Place the monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="gold tagline" default="CRAFTED IN GOLD"} near the bottom center.
3. Bottom-left panel: silver steel watch frozen inside a translucent block of cracked blue ice, with frosty mist, icy rock texture, and cold blue lighting. Place a large monogram above the brand name near the bottom center, with the small tagline {argument name="time tagline" default="BUILT BEYOND TIME"} beneath it.
4. Bottom-right panel: black and dark steel watch with neon green accents in a cyberpunk futuristic city at night, glowing skyscrapers, circuit-like lines, holographic HUD rings, and emerald light beams. Place a large glowing monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="future tagline" default="FUTURE. ENGINEERED."} near the bottom center.

Typography: Elegant luxury serif or widely spaced uppercase lettering for the brand name, thin uppercase tracking for taglines, centered and minimal. Text must be crisp and legible: brand name appears in all 4 panels, the monogram appears in all 4 panels, and each panel has exactly one tagline as listed.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic high-end watch advertising, macro product photography, cinematic lighting, glossy reflections, deep blacks, premium contrast, sharp metal textures, atmospheric particles, no people, no extra logos, no watermark, no additional text beyond the specified brand, monogram, and four taglines.

Panel count and details: Exactly 4 distinct watch posters:
1. Top-left panel: matte black watch in a dark smoky void, surrounded by black dust, volcanic ash, floating debris, and mist. Monochrome black-and-charcoal palette with silver highlights. Place the monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="darkness tagline" default="ENGINEERED IN DARKNESS"} near the bottom center.
2. Top-right panel: polished gold watch surrounded by a dramatic splash of liquid gold, bubbles, and warm amber reflections. Black background with intense golden highlights. Place the monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="gold tagline" default="CRAFTED IN GOLD"} near the bottom center.
3. Bottom-left panel: silver steel watch frozen inside a translucent block of cracked blue ice, with frosty mist, icy rock texture, and cold blue lighting. Place a large monogram above the brand name near the bottom center, with the small tagline {argument name="time tagline" default="BUILT BEYOND TIME"} beneath it.
4. Bottom-right panel: black and dark steel watch with neon green accents in a cyberpunk futuristic city at night, glowing skyscrapers, circuit-like lines, holographic HUD rings, and emerald light beams. Place a large glowing monogram above the brand name near the top center. Add the small tagline {argument name="future tagline" default="FUTURE. ENGINEERED."} near the bottom center.

Typography: Elegant luxury serif or widely spaced uppercase lettering for the brand name, thin uppercase tracking for taglines, centered and minimal. Text must be crisp and legible: brand name appears in all 4 panels, the monogram appears in all 4 panels, and each panel has exactly one tagline as listed.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic high-end watch advertising, macro product photography, cinematic lighting, glossy reflections, deep blacks, premium contrast, sharp metal textures, atmospheric particles, no people, no extra logos, no watermark, no additional text beyond the specified brand, monogram, and four taglines.

content:
Goal: Create a clean studio product render of a custom DIY smart doorbell / intercom enclosure, shown as an exploded multi-view product lineup.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 composition on a light gray seamless studio background, soft floor shadow, orthographic product-render look, no people, no branding watermark.

Subject: A compact rectangular electronics enclosure with rounded corners, matte {argument name="enclosure color" default="light gray"} plastic, slightly beveled edges, realistic 3D CAD rendering, subtle rough texture.

Layout: Show exactly 5 discrete enclosure views arranged left to right with even spacing: 1) a very thin left side profile standing upright with two stacked circular speaker or sensor grilles; 2) the main front face standing upright, slightly angled, with visible functional details; 3) a narrow side profile with a recessed USB-C port; 4) the rear cover plate standing upright with four corner screw holes and a side cutout; 5) the open back housing/case interior showing electronics installed in the top compartment and an empty lower compartment.

Front face details: On the main front view, include exactly 4 visible feature groups: a small round camera lens near the top center; a square black display/window below it showing two cute cartoon eyes; a large circular illuminated doorbell button below the display with a white glowing ring; and a horizontal speaker grille near the bottom made of short black slits in multiple rows. Add two small round side holes on the left edge of the main body.

Interior electronics: In the open back housing, include exactly 2 circuit boards and visible wiring: the top board is labeled {argument name="camera module label" default="ESP32-CAM"} with a small camera module, and the lower board is labeled {argument name="controller board label" default="DFPlayer Mini"}. Add neatly routed black, white, gray, and red wires around the boards. The interior should have a horizontal divider shelf separating the electronics bay from a larger empty lower cavity. Add four corner screw posts/holes inside the open case.

Style: Photorealistic 3D product visualization, high-detail industrial design concept, soft studio lighting from upper left, gentle ambient occlusion, crisp edges, realistic plastic material, neutral gray palette, shallow but clear shadows, centered composition.

Constraints: Use exactly 5 product views, keep all objects upright, no hands, no extra text beyond the two board labels, no logos, no decorative background objects.

content: Create a photorealistic luxury lifestyle advertisement featuring a {argument name="smartwatch model" default="black Apple Watch Ultra-style smartwatch"} worn on the left wrist of a well-groomed adult man. The watch must be the hero object: a rounded-square black case with a dark inactive glass screen, thick rugged bezel, side crown and buttons, and a black leather or textured band with subtle warm brown edge accents; preserve the case shape, band shape, materials, and tactile textures exactly. Show the man's hand resting elegantly on a polished wooden table, fingers extended naturally, with realistic skin pores, veins, knuckles, nails, and soft highlights. He wears a {argument name="suit color" default="deep navy suit"} with a crisp white shirt cuff visible behind the watch. Set the scene in an upscale private lounge or hotel club with warm wood paneling, brown leather armchairs, a side table, soft curtains, a green plant, and glowing table lamps in the blurred background. Use shallow depth of field, warm amber indoor lighting, cinematic bokeh, premium editorial composition, and a close-up three-quarter angle from slightly above the table. Keep the watch sharply focused while the background is softly defocused. No text, no logo emphasis, no extra accessories, no distorted anatomy, no changed watch proportions, no added screen UI.

content:
Goal: Create a premium Japanese potato chips package mockup inspired by a dark Catholic/European saint painting, using a black glossy snack bag with ornate gold typography and luxury limited-edition branding.

Canvas: Front-facing vertical product package, centered on a clean white background, realistic crinkled plastic potato chip bag with serrated sealed edges at top and bottom. Use a tall 3:4 composition, slightly rounded pillow-pack shape, glossy black material with strong highlights and folds.

Layout: At the very top center place a refined gold brand mark with a small crown and decorative flourishes reading {argument name="brand name" default="San Ignacio"}, with small katakana beneath it. Under that, add a short Japanese tagline in small white-gold text. Across the upper middle, place a very large embossed metallic-gold Japanese product title reading {argument name="product title" default="ポテトチップス"}. In the upper-left corner, add one vertical gold ribbon label reading {argument name="limited label" default="期間限定"}. The central-left area contains a framed religious oil-painting style portrait of Saint Ignatius in a black robe, halo, smoky clouds, and glowing sacred heart; place a neutral blurred rectangular mask over the face. The right middle contains a circular gold ornamental flavor badge with Japanese text reading {argument name="flavor text" default="聖イグナチオの スパイシー 黒胡椒味"}. The lower-left has one circular laurel badge reading "国産じゃがいも 100% 使用". The lower center foreground contains exactly 3 large golden ridged potato chips overlapping each other. The lower-right foreground contains exactly 1 small bowl filled with black peppercorns, plus exactly 2 red chili peppers and sprigs of green herbs. Along the bottom-left background, add a dark silhouette of a European church or cathedral at sunset. At the very bottom center, add one gold ribbon banner reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="イエズス会の精神を、味わいに込めて。"}, and add tiny disclaimer-style Japanese text at bottom right.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic commercial packaging design, luxury black-and-gold palette, embossed foil lettering, Baroque religious ornament, fine gold filigree borders, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, realistic chip texture with black pepper speckles, premium limited-edition snack branding. Keep all text integrated onto the bag surface with perspective and plastic wrinkles.

Constraints: Show exactly 1 product bag, 1 left ribbon label, 1 central saint portrait, 1 right circular flavor badge, 1 lower-left 100% badge, 3 visible potato chips, 1 peppercorn bowl, 2 red chili peppers, and 1 bottom banner. Do not add hands, people outside the illustration, extra packages, watermarks, or English replacement text for the Japanese package copy.
