content:
Goal: Create a vertical premium potato chips package design based on an ornate anime princess illustration, like a finished retail snack bag mockup.

Canvas: Portrait 3:4 product-package image, full front view of a glossy crinkled potato chip bag with sealed ridged top and bottom edges. Use a deep midnight navy and black-purple background with gold trim, sparkles, tiny stars, and luxury confectionery styling.

Main subject: On the left and center, show an elegant anime-style princess bride wearing an elaborate white lace gown with gold embroidery, jeweled bodice, pearl details, bows, floral appliqués, and a translucent veil flowing across the package. She holds a bouquet of yellow, cream, and pink roses. Her face area is covered by a plain centered beige rectangular placeholder, as if the character portrait can be swapped in later. Her long pale silver-blonde hair and veil blend into a magical starry night background.

Brand and text layout: At the upper right, place an ornate gold logo frame with a small crown and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Étoile de Reine"}, with the small Japanese subtitle 「エトワール・ドゥ・レーヌ」 beneath it. Below the logo, add a small elegant Japanese tagline 「やさしい時間を、ひとくちのごほうびに。」. Make the largest central headline in Japanese read {argument name="main product text" default="ポテトチップス"} in creamy white with a gold glow. At the top left, add a vertical hanging ribbon label in dark navy and gold that says {argument name="limited label" default="期間限定"}.

Flavor badge: On the right middle, create a cream circular ornamental label with gold filigree and flowers. Text inside should read 「ふんわり香る」 above the main flavor {argument name="flavor text" default="はちみつ バター味"}. Add a small mauve ribbon across the badge reading 「やさしい甘さとコク」. Beneath it, include small Japanese copy: 「はちみつのやさしい甘さと バターのコクがとろける、 幸せな味わい。」

Food elements: In the lower right foreground, show exactly 5 large golden potato chips overlapping, with visible seasoning specks and realistic crisp texture. To their right, show exactly 1 small glass bowl of honey with exactly 1 wooden honey dipper dripping honey. In front of it, show exactly 1 small white dish holding exactly 1 square pat of butter.

Quality badge and decorative elements: In the lower left, add a cream and gold circular badge reading 「国産じゃがいも 100% 使用」. Decorate the bottom left with pink roses and small flowers. Along the bottom, place a dark ribbon banner with gold trim reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="星降る夜のような、やさしいごほうび。"}. Add tiny legal text at bottom right: 「※写真・イラストはイメージです。」

Visual style: Highly polished Japanese luxury snack packaging, glossy plastic reflections, realistic package folds and highlights, ornate gold typography, soft magical lighting, detailed anime illustration, romantic royal theme, premium limited-edition feel. Keep all text legible and arranged like a real retail package. Do not add extra characters, extra food items, logos, barcodes, or watermarks.

content:
Goal: Create a realistic full-color snack package mockup for a baseball-themed potato chips bag, designed like a glossy crinkled Japanese retail package.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 product shot, front-facing sealed potato chip bag filling almost the entire frame, with red heat-sealed crimped edges at the top and bottom, transparent plastic highlights, wrinkles, creases, and reflective glare.

Main design: A warm sepia, kraft-paper, vintage sports-illustration background with dark red accents. Feature a dramatic hand-drawn baseball pitcher in a white uniform with red trim and a red cap, mid-throw, placed on the left half of the package. The uniform chest reads Carp in red script. The player wears a black baseball glove and red undersleeves. The face area is covered by a plain opaque brown rectangular block, centered over the face, as if anonymized.

Branding and text: At the top center, show the English logo {argument name="brand name" default="Carp Legend"} in dark red cursive with small baseball and star decorations. Under it, include small Japanese-style subtitle text. Make the largest central headline a bold dark red Japanese product title, {argument name="product name" default="ポテトチップス"}. On the right, place a large circular flavor seal with the main flavor text {argument name="flavor label" default="ガーリック ペッパー味"}, surrounded by smaller supporting copy. Add a red ribbon across the flavor seal with punchy short copy. At top left, add one vertical hanging red badge with gold border and stars, containing {argument name="limited badge text" default="期間限定"}. At bottom left, add one baseball-shaped seal reading {argument name="ingredient badge text" default="国産じゃがいも 100% 使用"}. Along the bottom, add a beige ribbon slogan with dark lettering.

Counted visible elements: Include exactly 4 major labeled package callouts: 1 top-left limited badge, 1 top-center brand logo area, 1 right circular flavor seal, and 1 bottom-left baseball ingredient seal. Include exactly 4 prominent potato chips in the foreground, overlapping at the bottom center, golden yellow with ridges and black pepper specks. Include exactly 5 seasoning props on the lower right: 1 whole garlic bulb, 2 peeled garlic cloves, 1 small wooden bowl, and 1 pile of black peppercorns in and around the bowl.

Visual style: Premium illustrated food packaging, nostalgic Japanese baseball poster art, textured crosshatching, aged paper tones, deep burgundy typography, golden lighting, realistic plastic bag reflections, appetizing food photography for the chips and garlic. Keep the image richly colored, not black and white.

Constraints: No extra characters, no hands outside the illustration, no watermark, no background outside the package except a thin neutral edge. Keep all text integrated into the printed bag design and maintain a realistic sealed snack-bag shape.

content:
Goal: Create a premium Japanese potato chips package design based on an illustration-world concept, turning a royal character into a colorful snack bag advertisement.

Canvas: Front-facing vertical product package mockup, 3:4 aspect ratio, isolated on a clean white background. The bag should look like glossy crinkled plastic with sealed ridged edges at the top and bottom, subtle folds, highlights, shadows, and slight perspective bulging like a real snack bag.

Package design: Use an elegant white, burgundy, and metallic gold color palette. The top and bottom bands are deep burgundy with gold trim lines; the main center area is pale white/cream with a faint palace or marble-column background. Add ornate gold flourishes, crown motifs, and premium European royal styling.

Brand and main text: At the top center place a gold crown logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Reggbis"} with small Japanese reading beneath it. In the top-left corner add a vertical burgundy ribbon badge reading 「期間限定」. Across the upper center, add small copy reading 「白の王子様と味わう贅沢なひととき」. The largest central product name should read 「ポテトチップス」 in bold metallic-gold Japanese lettering. On the right, inside an ornate gold frame with a crown, write 「白の王子様の 焦がしバター コンソメ味」. Beneath it add smaller copy: 「芳醇なコクとバターの余韻が広がる、贅沢な味わい。」

Main subject: Show one elegant white prince character occupying the left and center of the package art. The prince has long pale-blond hair and wears a white military-style royal uniform with gold embroidery, epaulettes, decorative buttons, a high collar, lace cuffs, and a red cape draped over one shoulder. Pose him confidently with one hand on his hip and the other hand raised near his head. The face is intentionally covered by a plain rectangular censor-like beige blur, preserving the package aesthetic. Use {argument name="character theme" default="white prince"} as the core character concept.

Food elements: Show exactly 4 food items in the lower-right foreground: 2 golden potato chips, 1 small round bowl of glossy brown consommé sauce, and 1 pat of butter melting on a yellow puddle. Chips should look crisp, lightly speckled, and appetizing, overlapping the lower part of the character and package.

Badges and footer: Add one diamond-shaped burgundy-and-gold badge at the lower left reading 「国産じゃがいも 100% 使用」 with a small crown. Along the bottom burgundy band write “Premium Potato Chips” in elegant gold cursive. Add tiny Japanese disclaimer text at the bottom right, similar to product-package fine print.

Visual style: Realistic commercial snack packaging mockup mixed with polished anime/cosplay illustration art, high-detail glossy plastic, luxury Japanese limited-edition product design, warm gold lighting, sharp typography, premium supermarket snack aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the design as a single potato chip bag only, no hands holding it, no extra products, no background scene outside the package, and make all Japanese text legible and positioned like authentic Japanese snack packaging.

content: Create a realistic studio product photograph of a single large black plastic garbage bag standing upright, fully stuffed and bulging into a rounded rectangular mound, with the top gathered tightly and tied in a small knot. The bag material is glossy, crinkled, wrinkled polyethylene with strong highlights, realistic folds, creases, tension lines, and subtle translucency variations. Centered on the front of the bag is a clean white corporate logo: a stylized icon made of vertical lightning-bolt-like bars rising diagonally above a small geometric mark, with the bold uppercase word {argument name="brand name" default="CODETEL"} printed beneath it. The logo should look screen-printed directly onto the plastic, slightly distorted by the wrinkles but still sharp and readable. Use a minimalist white seamless studio background, soft diffused lighting from the upper front-left, gentle shadow under the bag, high-end commercial product photography, square composition, centered subject, no extra objects, no people, no text other than the logo.

content: Create a photorealistic studio product shot of a single large black plastic garbage bag standing upright on a clean white seamless background. The bag is overfilled into a rounded rectangular sack shape with a flat heavy base, glossy crinkled polyethylene texture, sharp specular highlights, many wrinkles and folds, and the top gathered tightly and tied into a small knotted tuft. Centered on the front is a bold white custom printed logo: the words {argument name="brand text" default="GO GO RICO"} in chunky rounded block letters, arranged as two stacked “GO” words above a shield-shaped badge containing “RICO”; include a simple tropical palm tree graphic and angular geometric outline behind the lettering. Make the print look like real white ink on black plastic, slightly distorted by the wrinkles and bag curvature. Use front-facing composition, full bag visible, soft studio lighting, subtle floor shadow, high contrast black-and-white branding, minimal commercial mockup style, no extra objects, no people.

content: Create a realistic studio product mockup of a single large black plastic garbage bag standing upright on a clean white background. The bag is full and rounded with a squared base, glossy crinkled polyethylene texture, visible wrinkles, folds, highlights, and a tied knot at the top with gathered plastic flaring upward. Center the bag in the frame with soft, even lighting and a subtle gray shadow beneath it. Print a white custom company design on the front of the bag, consisting of exactly 3 visible printed elements: a large abstract circular logo at the upper center, the bold rounded uppercase brand name {argument name="brand name" default="CENTU"} below it, and a handwritten-style Spanish slogan {argument name="slogan text" default="¡Programando tu futuro hoy!"} underneath. Use high-contrast white ink that follows the creases and distortions of the plastic surface, making the print look physically applied to the bag rather than floating. Photorealistic commercial mockup, front-facing composition, minimal background, sharp details, natural reflections, premium branded packaging presentation.

content: Create a photorealistic studio product shot of a single glossy black plastic trash bag or merchandise bag standing upright, full and slightly bulging, centered on a clean white background with soft even lighting and a subtle floor shadow. On the front center, print a crisp white custom business logo in a carnival-style badge: a large outlined banner and geometric emblem with small stars, featuring the main brand text {argument name="brand name" default="ARCADIAS"} in bold playful lettering, a large arch shape incorporated into the wordmark, and the tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="LA ESQUINA DIVERTIDA"} curved underneath. content:
Please generate a realistic close-up of hand nail art, with the theme inspiration: {argument name="theme" default="jellyfish"}.

The main subject is a close-up of a meticulously cared-for female hand. The nails feature high-end gel designs, centered around {argument name="theme" default="jellyfish"}, presenting an elegant, clean, refined visual effect characteristic of fashion magazines. Emphasize the detail of the nail art, the glossy texture, and the consistency with the theme's atmosphere.

Composition and Subject Requirements:
The focus is on the hand and nail close-up. Finger gestures are natural and elegant, conveying a sense of luxury. Each nail is designed around the theme, using combinations like hand-painted elements, solid bases with glitter/foil accents, and varied but cohesive styles. Designs should include premium base gel, delicate painting, and matching decorations like sequins or metallic foil. The style must be professional and sophisticated, not cheap or juvenile.

Lighting and Photography:
Soft natural light, no harsh shadows, shallow depth of field, and sharp focus on nail details and gloss. High-end beauty editorial style, professional commercial photography, realistic skin textures, and 4K ultra HD clarity.

Background:
A soft, blurred background that echoes the {argument name="theme" default="jellyfish"} without distracting from the main subject.

Overall Style:
Photorealistic, glossy gel finish, elegant, and clean. Avoid cartoon/illustration styles, distorted fingers, or low-quality textures.

Aspect Ratio: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"}

Composition and Subject Requirements:
The focus is on the hand and nail close-up. Finger gestures are natural and elegant, conveying a sense of luxury. Each nail is designed around the theme, using combinations like hand-painted elements, solid bases with glitter/foil accents, and varied but cohesive styles. Designs should include premium base gel, delicate painting, and matching decorations like sequins or metallic foil. The style must be professional and sophisticated, not cheap or juvenile.

Lighting and Photography:
Soft natural light, no harsh shadows, shallow depth of field, and sharp focus on nail details and gloss. High-end beauty editorial style, professional commercial photography, realistic skin textures, and 4K ultra HD clarity.

Background:
A soft, blurred background that echoes the {argument name="theme" default="jellyfish"} without distracting from the main subject.

Overall Style:
Photorealistic, glossy gel finish, elegant, and clean. Avoid cartoon/illustration styles, distorted fingers, or low-quality textures.

Aspect Ratio: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="3:4"}

content: Please use only 1 real person's photo uploaded by the user as the sole identity reference to originally extend the person into a collectible designer vinyl figure in the {argument name="style direction" default="POP MART Hirono"} aesthetic, and output a high-completion single figure product scene image. Strictly preserve the real person's recognizability, including face shape, facial features relationship, hairstyle outline, sense of age, gender characteristics, skin tone tendency, overall temperament, and recognizable clothing identity and accessory features from the original photo, so that the final figure can clearly be identified as the same person from the uploaded photo. The overall style must clearly lean towards POP MART / Hirono designer vinyl aesthetics: quiet, soft, restrained, slightly melancholic, and pensive, like high-end Pop Mart collectible trendy toys rather than an ordinary cute plush. The figure should use big-head-small-body proportions, with the head about 2.5 to 3 times the size of the body, a short and rounded body, simplified limbs, and slightly larger shoes/socks, overall possessing a real sense of solid sculpture and weight. The posture should be calm, slightly leaning forward or slightly bowing the head, carrying a bit of character emotion without exaggerated movements. Faces must retain the original features but transform them into the Hirono vibe: half-open or slightly drooping sleepy eyes, thicker painted eyelashes, a small and restrained slightly pouty mouth, minimalist nose, rounded face shape, very faint blush or a few freckles, with expressions being slightly dazed, slightly world-weary, or slightly melancholic—no bright smiles or shiny anime eyes. Hair should retain the outline of the original photo but must be made into a solid, rounded, bundled, faceted handmade sculptural structure, not real hair strands, with hair colors using low-saturation natural colors like {argument name="hair color" default="soft brown, grey-brown, or soft black"} and matte treatment. Clothing should retain the original outfit's temperament but be simplified into thick, rounded, toy-like sculptural clothing blocks, potentially slightly oversized, with a few toy-like stitches, patches, or slight wear-and-tear details, avoiding real fabric textures. Recognizable accessories from the original photo like coffee cups, small bags, flowers, popsicles, books, or small dolls can be kept but must be transformed into slightly exaggeratedly proportioned matte figure accessories. The material must be high-end matte vinyl / matte resin / matte ceramic feel, with slight handmade sculpture marks and hand-painted texture, avoiding glossy, mirror highlights, glass feel, real skin, real hair, or visible texture maps. The scene should output a single full-body figure product image, not a grid, series display, packaging poster, or full blind box set. Place the figure in an exquisite, three-dimensional, unified miniature theme scene like a brand trendy toy product poster. The scene can be one of {argument name="scene theme" default="daily coffee, garden corner, cloud daydreaming, quiet study, moonlit daze, or animal companionship"}, requiring it to be three-dimensional, exquisite, photographic, and not overly complex. Lighting should use soft diffused product photography light with clean highlights, soft shadows, and neutral exposure, making the overall image look like a high-end Pop Mart new product shot. Strictly avoid ordinary Q-version illustrations, 2D anime feel, Korean webtoon style, Barbie doll look, realistic 3D plush feel, or complex cluttered backgrounds.

content: Create a high-end studio product photograph of a glossy anime prize figure of {argument name="character name" default="Reze"}, shown as a seated young woman figurine kneeling on a round tufted cushion base. The figure has {argument name="hair color" default="dark purple-black"} short bobbed hair with layered bangs and a small low side bun, pale skin, and a deliberately soft blurred face with no readable facial details. She wears a sleeveless pale lavender-white button-up blouse with a small black ribbon tie at the collar, fitted high-waisted black shorts, and smooth black thigh-high stockings; the blouse has faint semi-transparent lettering across the chest reading {argument name="shirt text" default="NOMAI"}. Pose her with both knees folded forward on the cushion, one hand resting on each side for support, torso slightly leaning back, shoulders relaxed, creating the look of a collectible scale figure rather than a real person. The base is a single circular display plinth: a black outer rim with a tan caramel-brown quilted leather-like cushion on top, including deep button-tufted depressions and glossy highlights. Use clean white seamless background, soft diffused studio lighting, sharp focus on the figure and base, realistic PVC figure material, subtle skin and fabric sheen, premium prize-figure product photography, three-quarter front view from slightly above, centered composition, no packaging, no extra props, no watermark except the faint shirt text.

content:
Emphasize skin texture: transparent and fair skin, realistic and delicate, pores faintly visible but clean, uniform and smooth texture, no blemishes, showing a healthy dewy skin glow. Highlights concentrated on cheekbones, nose bridge, forehead, and shoulders with soft specular highlights, expressing hydration and elasticity.

Black long hair flowing slightly, clean and supple with a natural luster and few faint golden light spots.

Wearing translucent silk clothing, light and skin-tight, soft and transparent material with very slight metallic reflections to set off skin texture.

Lighting system is studio lighting: soft key light illuminating the face from the side to enhance brightness and uniformity. Warm gold rim light outlines hair and shoulders. Fill light at the bottom and front to avoid dark shadows. Overall lighting is transparent, uniform, and not overexposed, emphasizing physically accurate lighting and materials.

Background is {argument name="background description" default="minimalist light gradient (cream + warm gold), large white space, clean and pure"}.

Bottom of the frame merges cool-toned turquoise water with mineral texture elements representing pure technology.

Color system: {argument name="color scheme" default="primary cream and gold, accented with cool turquoise and champagne gold, low saturation luxury"}.

Stable composition with clear visual hierarchy (Product > Skin > Light > Environment).

Overall style: International high-end skincare advertisement, realistic, transparent, healthy glowing skin.

Ultra-fine, 8K texture, commercial photography grade realistic materials.

Negative: Dull skin, greasy highlights, over-smoothed skin, plastic skin, high contrast shadows, heavy facial shadows, messy grain.

content: Create a photorealistic luxury product photograph of a square glass perfume bottle centered on wet black marble, with a clear thick transparent rectangular bottle, warm amber perfume liquid inside, and a reflective metallic gold rectangular cap covered in tiny water droplets. The front label reads {argument name="brand name" default="MAISON LUMIÈRE"} with smaller text {argument name="product type" default="EAU DE PARFUM"}. Use {argument name="lighting style" default="golden hour backlight"} shining directly from behind the cap, producing a bright sun flare, glowing amber highlights through the liquid, elegant caustic light patterns inside the bottle, and shimmering gold reflections on the wet marble surface. Add many realistic water droplets and condensation beads on the glass, cap, and tabletop, with small puddles and marble veining visible around the base. The background is softly blurred with warm vertical architectural shapes and circular bokeh lights, creating a premium high-end fragrance campaign mood. Shoot from a slightly low eye-level angle with shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the bottle edges and label, dramatic contrast, cinematic warm tones, ultra-detailed commercial product photography, 1:1 square composition.

content: Create a photorealistic luxury product photograph of a single {argument name="product type" default="perfume bottle"} centered on a glossy wet black marble surface with fine white and gold veining. The bottle is faceted clear glass with a rounded-square octagonal silhouette, filled with rich {argument name="liquid color" default="amber golden-brown"} perfume, visible internal reflections, tiny air bubbles, and vertical refraction lines; it has a short neck and a smooth cylindrical brushed-metal {argument name="cap color" default="champagne gold"} cap with a small minimalist monogram on top. Surround the bottle with scattered water droplets and several larger shallow puddles that create mirror reflections and subtle rainbow caustic highlights. Use dramatic {argument name="lighting style" default="golden hour backlight"} from the upper rear, casting warm sunbeams through a peach-orange background haze, strong rim highlights on the glass, sparkling specular points on the wet stone, and a crisp reflection of the bottle in the foreground. content: A clean studio product photo of a realistic Canadian citizenship card lying flat on a light gray matte surface, centered with generous empty space around it. The card is shown in landscape orientation with rounded corners, subtle thickness, and a soft drop shadow, photographed from a nearly top-down angle with slight perspective. The design is a bilingual Canadian ID card with a pale pastel security background of fine guilloche lines in pink, blue, and gray, plus faint abstract wave patterns. In the top left are 2 small Canadian flags flanking the header text in bold black sans-serif: “CANADA – CANADIAN CITIZENSHIP CARD” on the first line and “CARTE DE CITOYENNETÉ CANADIENNE” on the second. On the left side is 1 passport-style head-and-shoulders portrait of a woman with straight dark brown hair, center part, wearing a navy crew-neck shirt, but the face is obscured by a solid rectangular blur block for privacy. To the right of the portrait is the main ID text in black, mixing uppercase labels and values, arranged in neat left-aligned lines. Use the visible bilingual fields and values exactly as follows: “Surname / Nom” then “MARTIN”; “Given names / Prénoms” then “ÉMILIE SOPHIE”; nationality line “CANADIAN / CANADIENNE”; “Citizenship Number / Numéro de citoyenneté” then “1234-5678”; “Date of birth / Date de naissance” then “14 APR 1996”; “Sex / Sexe” then “F”; “Place of birth / Lieu de naissance” then “MONTRÉAL, QC, CANADA”; “Issue date / Date d’émission” then “20 MAY 2024”; “Expiry date / Date d’expiration” then “20 MAY 2034”. In the upper right corner include 2 official security elements: a dark Canadian coat of arms emblem and beneath it a small metallic square with a maple leaf. In the lower right include 1 large iridescent holographic maple leaf security feature with rainbow shimmer. Along the bottom right add a cursive signature reading “Émilie S. Martin” with the caption beneath it “Holder’s Signature / Signature du titulaire”. The overall style is highly realistic government-issued document photography, sharp printed text, authentic ID layout, subtle paper-plastic card texture, neutral lighting, minimal background, no hands, no extra objects.

content: Using the provided floor plan reference image, convert the 2D black-and-white architectural plan into a clean photorealistic 3D isometric real-estate floor plan render while preserving the original layout, room sizes, labels, and the side-by-side composition of the 1F and 2F plans. Add realistic wall thickness, light wood flooring, soft neutral wall colors, doors and windows with depth, and fully furnished interiors appropriate to each room. Keep all visible Japanese room labels in place, including 1F, 2F, 洗面所, 浴室, 収納, 階段下収納, ホール, 玄関, トイレ, L.D.K (18.0帖), 洋室 (6.0帖) for 2 rooms, ウォークインクローゼット (3.0帖), and 主寝室 (6.0帖). Stage the 1F with 1 kitchen, 1 dining table set for 4, 1 living area with sofa and coffee table, 1 toilet, 1 bathroom with tub, 1 wash area, and small plants. Stage the 2F with 3 sleeping/work rooms total: 1 bedroom with a single bed, 1 room with a desk and chair, and 1 master bedroom with a double bed, plus 2 storage spaces and 1 walk-in closet with shelving. Use a bright catalog-style presentation on a plain light background, viewed from a slightly elevated angled top-down perspective, suitable for a property sales brochure.

content:
Create a clean editorial collage of 6 fashion-and-beauty product campaign visuals on a light gray studio background, arranged in a balanced magazine-style grid with rounded rectangular image blocks and generous white space. Add elegant serif text at the top left reading "GPT image 2.0" with a smaller handwritten script subtitle reading "Prompt Template". Each panel should combine an oversized foreground product held close to the camera with a full-body fashion model in the background, using forced perspective so the product looks much larger than the person. Use sharp studio lighting, soft shadows, glossy commercial retouching, high-end advertising aesthetics, and vibrant color styling.

Panel 1: a close hand holding a tall rectangular pink lip gloss tube with metallic cap, label visible, in front of a female model wearing a bold monochrome red outfit with a red jacket and shiny red pants, standing in a dynamic leaning pose with pink platform heels.

Panel 2: a close hand holding a frosted skincare essence bottle with a black cap, luxury minimalist label, in front of a female model wearing a red tailored pantsuit and red heels, posed in a fashion-forward stride or lunge.

Panel 3: a close hand holding a square bottle of red nail polish with a black cap and luxury branding, in front of a female model wearing a coral pleated midi skirt, teal top or jacket, a dark quilted handbag, and heeled sandals, posed as if walking.

Panel 4: a larger bottom-left hero panel featuring a close hand holding a large white-and-green pump bottle of facial cleanser with pharmacy-style branding, in front of a female model crouching low in green track pants, white crop top, blue jacket, and white sneakers, with a wide-angle fashion pose.

Panel 5: a close hand holding a red glass skincare serum dropper bottle with white text, in front of a female model in a teal satin-like blouse and flowing coral or red skirt, posed in motion.

Panel 6: a close hand holding a white low-top sneaker with a black swoosh, in front of a female model wearing a white cropped jacket, white top, and dark pleated skirt, posed in a graceful editorial stance.

Overall composition should feel like a social-media-ready campaign template for agencies: modern, premium, minimal, stylish, commercial, and highly polished. Keep the background uncluttered, faces intentionally soft or de-emphasized, and emphasize the contrast between the oversized products and the fashion models behind them.

content:
A high-resolution commercial marketing photograph featuring the same {argument name="model description" default="young woman with sleek dark hair, now styled in a soft, natural wave"}. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="minimal beige satin top"} and is positioned in a clean, matte ivory studio setting. The composition places a luxury “{argument name="product name" default="LumiSkin Vitamin C Serum"}” dropper bottle prominently in the foreground, held delicately between her fingers at chest level, angled toward the camera for emphasis.

The visual energy is enhanced with vibrant tangerine-orange graphic accents, including flowing liquid streaks and circular glow elements that suggest radiance and hydration. Floating translucent callouts highlight key features such as “brightening boost” and “24h glow hydration” in bold, modern sans-serif typography.

Lighting is soft yet directional, creating a gentle glow on the model’s skin while producing a crisp, reflective shine on the glass serum bottle, emphasizing its premium finish. The serum inside has a rich amber tone that catches the light beautifully. A large, bold headline in the upper left reads: “Why your skin loves it” in bright orange, adding contrast and visual hierarchy.

The overall aesthetic is clean, luminous, and high-end, with a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s confident, natural expression in sharp focus, while the background fades smoothly for a polished, editorial feel.

content: Create a premium e-commerce product advertisement in a clean botanical skincare style, featuring an open gift box of {argument name="product name" default="MONSTER 皮肤精华"} centered on a light stone tabletop. The packaging is pale sage green and off-white with a minimalist luxury aesthetic, soft matte finish, and delicate watercolor leaf illustrations inside the lid and on the sachets. The box lid is open upright, showing elegant typography: the large brand line {argument name="brand text" default="MONSTER 皮肤精华"}, a secondary line {argument name="headline text" default="7天舒缓肌肤"}, smaller Chinese copy beneath, and 3 small circular feature icons aligned horizontally in the center area. Inside the box, show exactly 4 flat sheet-mask sachets stacked on the left and exactly 5 slim glass serum ampoules standing in a row on the right, each with silver caps and vertical label text. On the front lip of the box, print the same product branding in small refined type. On the right side of the composition, place exactly 3 vertically stacked line-art benefit icons with bilingual labels: a leaf icon with {argument name="benefit one" default="舒缓修护"} and the English subtitle "SOOTHING REPAIR", wavy water lines with {argument name="benefit two" default="水润保湿"} and the English subtitle "HYDRATING", and a balance scale icon with the Chinese label "平衡肌肤" and the English subtitle "BALANCE". Surround the scene with a serene natural spa environment: soft-focus green branches entering from the upper left and upper right edges, moss-covered stones on both sides, subtle leaves in the foreground, and diffused daylight on a warm ivory background. Use a balanced front-facing composition, gentle shadows, high-end commercial lighting, crisp packaging detail, muted green palette, and a calm, trustworthy, premium skincare advertisement look.

content: Create a luxury skincare campaign collage in a 4 by 3 editorial grid with exactly 12 tiles, using a warm ivory, cream, champagne, and soft beige palette. The overall mood is ultra-refined, minimal, sensual, and high-end, with milky diffused lighting, soft cinematic shadows, glossy hydrated skin, and a premium beauty magazine aesthetic. Tile 1: a frosted glass skincare pump bottle standing on a clear shelf, matte cream body, metallic gold pump and collar, elegant serif branding reading {argument name="brand name" default="BLOOMGLOW"}, product name reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE MOISTURIZING EMULSION"}, photographed against a creamy beige wall with diagonal sunlight. Tile 2: a macro swipe of thick white lotion on a smooth cream surface, sculptural texture, soft highlights. Tile 3: a close crop of a woman's head and neck from behind, dark hair in a clean low bun, luminous skin, ear visible, minimal composition. Tile 4: sheer cream curtains lit by sunlight with the shadow silhouette of leaves or flowers cast across them. Tile 5: close-up of a woman's bare shoulder and upper back, dewy glowing skin, one hand touching the shoulder, a thin streak of lotion trailing down the back, intimate skincare editorial framing. Tile 6: a glossy translucent droplet of emulsion resting on a creamy matte surface, macro product texture study. Tile 7: a close crop of the lower face, jawline, neck, and collarbone of the same woman, fingers gently touching the neck, fresh hydrated glow, soft shadow. Tile 8: another macro smear of white cream, smoother and broader than tile 2, with reflective wet highlights. Tile 9: sunlit rippling water in pale champagne tones, abstract liquid texture with sparkling reflections. Tile 10: the same skincare bottle lying diagonally on softly wrinkled satin or silk fabric, gentle sunlight, subtle shadow, branding visible. Tile 11: close-up of hands applying a white oval dollop of lotion onto the back of one hand with the fingertips of the other hand, elegant manicured natural nails. Tile 12: glossy neckline and shoulders of the woman, collarbones highlighted, luminous moisturized skin, dark hair partially visible at the top edge. Keep the composition clean and balanced with thin white dividers between all 12 panels. Style keywords: minimalist luxury, creamy soft light, premium cosmetic advertisement, tactile textures, hydration, skin radiance, cinematic beauty editorial, understated opulence, breathable moisture glow. No clutter, no bright colors, no props beyond bottle, fabric, water, curtains, and skincare textures.

content:
Create a clean, high-end Japanese fashion catalog page on a soft warm light-gray background, featuring a coordinated rainwear set laid flat as a product editorial. The central focus is 1 women's hooded raincoat in a muted dusty blue tone, shown front-facing and neatly arranged with sleeves slightly bent inward. The coat is mid-thigh length with a full front zipper, snap-button storm placket details near the collar, a large structured hood, adjustable drawcords at both the hood and waist, two vertical zip pockets, subtle seam construction, and a slightly longer curved back hem with a darker inner lining visible at the bottom opening. Above and to the right, place 1 matching wide-brim rain hat in the same dusty blue, angled slightly, with a darker contrasting brim underside and a small black tag on the crown. Use soft diffused studio lighting with gentle realistic shadows to give a premium product-photography look.

Add editorial typography and callouts around the products in a minimalist Japanese layout. In the upper left, place a small Japanese tagline reading "雨の日も、わたしらしく。" above a large serif English headline reading "OUTDOOR SET UP". Beneath it, add a short vertical block of Japanese body copy describing the stylish functional raincoat-and-hat set. In the lower left, add a serif subheading "DETAILS" with 2 circular inset detail photos stacked vertically: the top circle shows a close-up of the hood and front fastening area with drawcord hardware; the bottom circle shows water droplets beading on the blue waterproof fabric. To the right of each circle, place short Japanese explanatory text. On the right side of the page, add 2 product callout labels in serif English with thin leader lines: "HAT" near the upper-right hat with a short Japanese description below, and "COAT" near the lower-right side of the coat with a short Japanese description below. Keep the layout airy and balanced, with elegant negative space, refined magazine styling, realistic garment textures, and a modern outdoor-luxury aesthetic.

content: Create a clean e-commerce mockup on a very light gray background with a simple two-image comparison layout. In the upper right, place 1 small rounded-corner reference photo showing a white fluffy dog from behind, standing on soft light blue fabric and wearing a cream knit pet sweater with pale blue trim. The sweater features a large cartoon dog face patch in brown, black, and white, a red cursive word "Smile," a small red cherry, a blue star, and a yellow crescent moon. Beneath that small reference image, place 1 rounded light-gray text bubble containing Japanese instruction text in black sans-serif: 「画像内のペットを猫に差し替え、元の画像と同じ衣装を着せた状態にする。猫は正面または側面が見える向きで、全身がはっきり見えるようにする。」 In the lower left, place 1 larger rounded-corner final image with a subtle dark border, showing a full-body gray tabby and white cat standing on the same soft light blue fabric backdrop. The cat is facing slightly left but looking directly at the camera, with upright ears, large round eyes, white chest and legs, gray striped back and tail, and a calm alert expression. The cat wears the same cream knitted pet sweater with light blue ribbed trim around the neck, armholes, and hem, fitted neatly around the torso. The sweater artwork matches the reference: the red cursive "Smile" text, a red cherry motif, a blue star, a yellow crescent moon, and a large textured cartoon dog face patch on the side. Lighting is soft and diffuse, like a studio product photo for an online shop, with a realistic fabric texture, minimal shadows, and a polished pet apparel catalog aesthetic.

and a matching light beige cap with the SHAMUS logo on it. The environment should have light wooden
counters and shelves, warm natural lighting, and minimal branded packaging displayed on the shelves
in the background. The mood should feel clean, airy, and contemporary. Right panel: Show a cropped
lifestyle shot of a person standing near a wooden doorway or wall, wearing a white long-sleeve shirt
and loose black pants, holding a white paper takeaway bag with a die-cut handle. The " SHAMUS" logo
Only the lower torso and hand should be visible for a stylish editorial composition

content: A polished, high-end product photography scene showcases a confident young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="smooth dark hair"}, dressed in a soft pink textured top, standing against a minimalist grey studio backdrop. In the foreground, a sleek {argument name="product name" default="Ellie Beauty spray bottle"} takes center focus, sharply detailed with a reflective metallic label that shifts between green and gold tones. The composition is brought to life with dynamic lime-green motion streaks and floating rounded tags that call out key benefits such as “high-shine finish” and “heat defense up to 450°F” in bold, modern sans-serif typography. Soft, diffused studio lighting enhances the model’s natural features while producing crisp reflections along the bottle’s surface. In the upper corner, a striking lime-green headline poses the question, “{argument name="headline" default="What does it do?"}”, tying the layout together with a fresh, contemporary advertising feel and a shallow depth of field that keeps both the product and the model’s expression clear and compelling.

content: A high-end commercial skincare product photo on a light marble bathroom counter, centered on a clear glass dropper bottle filled with warm amber-orange serum. The bottle is covered in realistic condensation droplets and has a white rubber pipette top with a shiny metallic gold collar. The front label is elegant and minimal, reading {argument name="brand name" default="HydraGlow"} with smaller lines {argument name="product name" default="Vitamin C Serum - 30ml"} and {argument name="benefit line" default="Brightening & Anti-Aging Formula"}, plus a simple gold botanical lotus-style logo above the brand name. Soft natural morning light streams in from the side, creating gentle highlights, subtle shadows, and a clean luxury spa atmosphere. In the blurred background, include 1 ribbed clear glass vase with green leafy branches on the left, 1 stack of 3 folded white towels on the right, 1 shallow white dish with faint gold veining on the left foreground, and 1 small white bowl with a thin gold rim on the right foreground. Use shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the bottle, neutral cream and white palette, premium e-commerce advertising aesthetic, photorealistic textures, and refined wellness branding style.

content: A premium eco-conscious fashion advertisement, shot as a refined editorial product photo. A single off-white or natural cream crew-neck T-shirt hangs on a smooth wooden hanger with a black metal hook, placed against a lush wall of dense green leaves and climbing vines. The hanger has a small minimalist brand monogram engraved near the neck. The shirt is shown from the upper torso down to part of the hem, slightly angled, with soft natural folds and high-quality cotton texture. Printed inside the collar is a minimalist brand mark and the text "JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS". Hanging from the neckline is 1 rectangular recycled-paper seed tag tied with rustic brown twine; the tag reads "Tulsi" and "Plantable Seed Tag" with a tiny sprouting seed detail near the bottom. From the tag, 1 real tulsi plant stem grows upward across the front of the shirt, with several fresh green leaves, visually demonstrating that the tag is plantable. Add a small fine-label annotation near the tag reading "TULSI PLANTABLE SEED TAG". On the right side, large elegant white serif typography says {argument name="headline text" default="Plant it."}. Beneath it, place 3 stacked lines of narrow uppercase sans-serif copy: "WEAR IT.", "PLANT IT.", and "GROW WITH IT.". At the lower left, add the brand name in spaced uppercase serif text: {argument name="brand name" default="JUGGERKNOT ORIGINALS"}, with a thin horizontal line above it. At the lower right, add 3 lines of small uppercase sans-serif text: "FSC® CERTIFIED PACKAGING.", "ZERO SYNTHETIC FIBRE", and "BACKED BY ZERODHA.". Use soft diffused daylight, shallow depth of field, moody green-and-cream color grading, luxury sustainable-brand aesthetics, clean composition, vertical poster layout, subtle shadows, and a calm organic atmosphere. Keep the design minimal, premium, and photorealistic, with the shirt occupying the left half and the typography balanced on the right.

content: A high-end studio advertising poster for {argument name="brand name" default="crocs"}, in a monochrome pastel blue and white color palette, with a glossy reflective floor and a soft sky-blue backdrop. The background is dominated by the word {argument name="headline text" default="CROCS"} in gigantic bold white condensed sans-serif letters spanning nearly the full height of the image. In the top-right corner, add small white text reading "Designed with ChatGPT". Feature 3 adult women with shoulder-length wavy light brown to dark blonde hair, all wearing loose oversized white long-sleeve tops and flowing white wide-leg pants, styled as minimalist fashion models with relaxed neutral expressions. Their faces are intentionally obscured or blurred. One model reclines against an enormous upright white clog shoe on the left side, one model sits casually on top of a giant white clog on the upper right, and one model lounges on the floor at the lower right, leaning back on one arm while seated partly on a glossy blue sphere. Include 2 oversized white clog shoes as hero props: one standing vertically on the left showing the sole and side profile, and one angled on blue crystalline blocks at center-right showing the upper and toe box. Both clogs are classic foam slip-on style with perforation holes, chunky tread, heel straps, and circular logo rivets. The center-right clog is decorated with exactly 8 visible charms pinned to the upper: a blue-green iridescent round charm, a white daisy with yellow center, a black-and-white round emblem near the strap, a small "CROCS" word charm, a dark flower, a peace-hand sign, an orange smiley face, a white cloud, and an orange flower. Scatter exactly 7 glossy floating or grounded blue spheres of varying sizes around the set: one large sphere behind the left model, one medium sphere floating near center, one medium sphere at bottom left foreground, one medium sphere used as a seat under the lower-right model, one small sphere near the upper left, and 2 additional blue spheres integrated into the composition. Add translucent sculptural gel-like forms at the far left and far right edges, plus angular blue crystal-like rocks beneath the right shoe. At the bottom center, place white promotional copy in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline line 1" default="Made for comfort, worn for confidence."} on the first line and {argument name="tagline line 2" default="Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining."} on the second line. Beneath that, show 4 minimalist feature icons with labels in white: "ICONIC COMFORT", "LIGHTWEIGHT", "EASY TO CLEAN", and "UNIQUELY YOU". Place the {argument name="logo text" default="crocs"} logo in bold lowercase white at the bottom center with a small trademark symbol. The overall style should feel like a premium surreal fashion campaign, clean editorial lighting, soft shadows, glossy textures, airy composition, and modern lifestyle product advertising.

content: A luxurious cinematic product photograph of a classic rectangular perfume bottle inspired by {argument name="brand label" default="N°5 CHANEL PARIS PARFUM"}, placed upright on a glossy black marble surface with white veining. The bottle is centered slightly to the right, made of clear faceted glass with a large transparent crystal stopper, filled with rich amber-gold perfume that glows from within. Tiny condensation droplets cover the glass, adding texture and realism. Dramatic warm lighting from the upper left creates golden highlights, deep reflections on the marble, and a soft luminous bloom in the background. Wisps of elegant smoke curl around the bottle on both sides, enhancing a moody high-end advertisement feel. Dark background, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed studio product photography, luxury beauty campaign aesthetic, crisp focus on the bottle, realistic reflections, warm black-and-gold color palette. Add a small white {argument name="corner logo" default="Pollo.ai"} in the top-right corner. Square composition, premium commercial ad, photorealistic, high contrast, refined and sophisticated.

content: Create a vibrant tropical commercial poster for a citrus soda bottle, in a bright summer advertising style. Show a single large plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="Soda"} centered slightly to the right, tilted a little left, with a yellow cap and transparent bottle covered in cold condensation droplets, filled with glowing golden-orange soda. The label should feature sliced oranges and citrus artwork with the brand text "{argument name="product name" default="Soda"}", the phrase "aux agrumes d'été", and a small green "500 ml" mark. Use a sunny beach background with vivid blue sky, turquoise ocean, soft clouds, and blurred tropical palm leaves entering from the upper right corner. Add dramatic water splashes around the base of the bottle, scattered clear ice cubes, and 5 visible citrus pieces in the foreground: 2 orange wedges, 1 lime half, 1 grapefruit half, and 1 partial orange slice at the far right edge. Place large French promotional text on the left: a huge white headline "{argument name="headline text" default="Soda"}" with a small splash accent above it, then yellow script text "aux agrumes d'été" underneath. Add a yellow paint-stroke badge at mid-left with the text "LA FRAÎCHEUR QUI PÉTILLE !". Add a vertical feature list on the lower left with 3 round icons and French captions: "SAVEURS NATURELLES", "SANS COLORANTS ARTIFICIELS", and "EXTRA RAFRAÎCHISSANT". Add a green brushstroke banner at the bottom left reading "FORMAT PRATIQUE 500 ml". Add a round beige eco-style seal at the bottom right with green outline and leaf motif, containing the text "{argument name="seal text" default="PLAISIR FRUITÉ À CHAQUE GORGÉE"}". Lighting should be glossy and high-energy with strong sun flare from the upper left, saturated citrus colors, crisp packaging detail, realistic droplets, and polished supermarket-ad realism.

content:
Core Subject: [{argument name="reference" default="use the uploaded image"}, keep the details, typography and structure locked 100%]

Layout & Composition: A {argument name="presentation type" default="professional industrial design presentation sheet"}. The image should be organized into a clean grid system.

Top Row: A 3x3 layout showing top-down flat lay views and close-up macro details of materials.

Middle Section: Three hero shots of the product standing upright in different color ways (Matte Black, Arctic White, and accented variants). The products should be slightly tilted to show depth and form.

Bottom Section: A dynamic "floating" composition featuring two products overlapping at opposing angles to showcase the front and side profiles simultaneously.

Environment & Lighting: Set against a minimalist, neutral studio gray background. Soft top-down lighting with realistic contact shadows. High-end product photography aesthetic.

Style & Finish: Matte textures, clean silhouettes, and sharp edges. Leave designated blank areas on the product surfaces for "Placeholder Branding" and "Graphic Mockups." 4k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render style, hyper-realistic, clean aesthetic.

Bottom Section: A dynamic "floating" composition featuring two products overlapping at opposing angles to showcase the front and side profiles simultaneously.

Environment & Lighting: Set against a minimalist, neutral studio gray background. Soft top-down lighting with realistic contact shadows. High-end product photography aesthetic.

Style & Finish: Matte textures, clean silhouettes, and sharp edges. Leave designated blank areas on the product surfaces for "Placeholder Branding" and "Graphic Mockups." 4k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render style, hyper-realistic, clean aesthetic.

content: A warm, editorial-style lifestyle product photo shot indoors from a low close-up angle, focused on a woman's lower legs and feet as she tries on 1 pair of black leather backless loafers with tan faux-fur lining. One loafer is worn on the right foot and the left foot is bare, hovering just above the textured cream shag rug, while the second matching loafer lies on the rug in the lower left foreground. The shoes have smooth black leather uppers, a rounded almond toe, open mule-style heel, plush brown fur spilling out around the opening, and a small polished gold horsebit hardware detail across the vamp. The model wears cropped medium-blue denim jeans with a raw frayed hem. The setting is a cozy minimalist interior with a cream rug featuring 2 thin irregular black lines, a neutral wall, and a leaning rectangular mirror with a medium wood frame in the upper right background, softly reflecting the rug and part of the scene. Use soft natural window light, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, realistic skin texture, muted beige and black palette, relaxed candid composition, premium fashion catalog mood, high detail, photorealistic.

content: A luxury e-commerce advertising photo of a premium perfume bottle on a polished gray-and-white marble vanity, shot in a warm cinematic studio style with soft golden lighting, shallow depth of field, and elegant reflections. The composition is square and high-end, with the perfume bottle centered slightly right of frame and promotional text on the left. The bottle is a tall sculpted hourglass-shaped glass flacon with smoky transparent gray glass fading darker at the base, a glossy gold spherical cap, a gold collar engraved with fine branding, and a large metallic gold interlocking monogram on the front. Keep the branding-inspired feel but do not add extra products. In the foreground left, include 1 cut-crystal bowl with a gold rim, partially cropped. content: Create a high-end luxury perfume advertisement in a vertical smartphone-friendly editorial layout. Show a close-up, cropped portrait of an elegant woman from the back-left side, with only the lower half of her face and shoulder area visible, her head turned slightly away so her ear, jawline, neck, and shoulder are prominent while the upper face is mostly out of frame. Her hair is styled in a soft, voluminous brunette updo with loose, polished strands. She wears a silky ivory spaghetti-strap slip dress. Her skin is luminous with warm, diffused highlights. In one hand she delicately holds a rectangular glass perfume bottle near her neck and collarbone, fingers graceful and refined. The bottle contains pale golden liquid, has a faceted transparent cap, and a cream square label that reads {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"} with smaller text below reading "EAU DE PARFUM". Use a minimalist fine-art beauty campaign aesthetic with soft beige, champagne, ivory, and blush tones, bright natural studio lighting, gentle shadows, shallow depth of field, crisp glass reflections, and a clean off-white background. Leave generous negative space on the right side for ad copy. content: Create a high-converting Japanese e-commerce product advertisement square image for a pair of ultra-cushioned insoles, styled like a Rakuten marketplace hero banner. Bright sky-blue gradient background with soft white clouds, clean glossy commercial design, energetic and premium. Large central Japanese headline in bold white calligraphic serif text with blue glow: "雲インソール". Above it, a rounded white capsule banner with blue text: "履いた瞬間ふわっ！". Below the main headline, smaller white handwritten-style Japanese subheading: "まるで雲の上を歩くような心地よさ". Show 4 insole product views total: 1 large white foam sole held vertically in a realistic human hand at lower left foreground, featuring a pebble-like bubble texture with small ventilation holes; 1 gray fabric-covered insole standing upright in the center; 2 stacked angled white insoles at lower right, emphasizing thick soft cushioning and textured underside. Add a large gold award badge at top left with crown and laurel, containing the Japanese text "第1位" and a red ribbon reading "楽天ランキング". Add a vertical gold ribbon badge at top right with the Japanese text "累計販売数 10万足 突破!". On the left side, place 4 vertically stacked rounded white icon boxes under a small blue handwritten caption "こんなお悩みに!", with simple blue line icons and labels: 1 "足の疲れ", 2 "衝撃吸収", 3 "長時間の立ち仕事", 4 "ウォーキング スポーツに". On the right side, place 2 rounded white feature boxes with blue outlines and blue-gray icon illustrations: top box text "衝撃吸収 疲れにくい" with a walking person icon; bottom box text "通気性◎ ムレにくい" with airflow lines icon. At the bottom right, add a large white cloud-shaped callout with bold blue Japanese text "極上の クッション感" and a tiny blue cloud icon. At the bottom center, place a small blue rounded label "選べるサイズ" with large blue size text underneath: "23.0cm〜29.0cm". Use crisp product-photography lighting, soft shadows, glossy highlights, vivid contrast, and a polished online shopping ad composition optimized for instant conversion.

content: A clean Japanese e-commerce promotional poster for a waterproof rainwear set, square format, bright high-key product ad style. Show 2 adult models walking outdoors on a wet pavement in light rain with a soft blurred background: 1 taller male model wearing a taupe-brown hooded waterproof jacket and black rain pants, and 1 shorter female model wearing a dusty pink hooded waterproof jacket and black rain pants. Both outfits are lightweight rain suits with zip-front jackets, subtle fabric sheen, visible water droplets on the surface, and casual sneakers. Faces are de-emphasized and not the focus. Use a white and pale gray background layout with the models placed center-right and full body visible. On the left side, large bold Japanese headline text in a mix of black and vivid blue reads exactly: "雨でも快適。しっかり防水" with small blue raindrop accents and a small umbrella icon near the text, plus a yellow brushstroke underline accent beneath the second line. Beneath the headline, add a blue ribbon-style banner with white Japanese text: "上下セット / 男女兼用". Below that, place exactly 3 circular blue feature icons in a horizontal row with Japanese labels: 1) water drops icon with text "耐水圧 20,000mm", 2) upward stretch arrows icon with text "ムレにくい", 3) feather icon with text "軽量設計". At the bottom left, display exactly 6 small product color variants as miniature jacket-and-pants set thumbnails arranged in 2 rows of 3. The 6 colorways are: black set, navy set, olive green set, pink set, beige set, and light gray set. In the top right corner, add a gold laurel award badge with red ribbons and Japanese text reading "Yahoo! ショッピング 第1位 RANKING" with smaller text beneath indicating a daily ranking note. Overall style: polished Japanese marketplace listing hero image, realistic apparel photography composited with clean graphic design, commercial catalog quality, waterproof outdoor lifestyle feel, soft overcast lighting, crisp typography, premium but accessible consumer product presentation.

content: Create a clean Japanese e-commerce advertisement image for a premium yoga mat in a bright minimalist home interior. The main scene shows 1 woman with her face softly blurred, doing an upward-facing dog yoga pose on a thick pastel pink yoga mat placed diagonally across a pale wood floor. She wears a white sports bra and light gray leggings, with her hair in a neat bun. In the left foreground, show 1 rolled purple yoga mat secured with 2 black straps. Along the bottom edge, display exactly 7 small rolled mat color variations in a row: pink, lavender, sky blue, mint green, beige, light gray, and black. Add large Japanese promotional typography on the left in a stylish modern layout: the headline reads "やさしく支える。" with "やさしく" in handwritten pink script and "支える。" in black, followed by a bold large line "極厚 10mm" with "10" oversized in pink and "mm" smaller in pink italic style. Under that, add a pink rectangular banner with white text reading "滑りにくい / TPE素材". Beneath the banner, place exactly 3 circular feature icons with labels in Japanese: 1) a non-slip texture icon labeled "滑り止め", 2) a cushioning icon with downward arrows labeled "クッション性", 3) a feather icon labeled "軽量". In the upper right corner, add a gold laurel award badge with a crown and layered red ribbons, containing the Japanese text "Yahoo! JAPAN ショッピング RANKING 第1位 ヨガマット部門". In the lower right corner, add a pink angled label reading "選べる 7色" with the number 7 large and white. The background should be soft, airy, and high-key with a white wall, natural daylight, and a slightly out-of-focus potted green plant and woven basket on the right side. Use a polished commercial product-photography style, soft shadows, pastel color palette, luxury wellness branding, sharp layout, and realistic materials, suitable for an online marketplace hero image.

Surround the bag with exactly 11 visible potato chips flying through the air at different depths and angles, some curled and some flat, with crisp texture and golden highlights. Fill the scene with explosive golden crumbs, seasoning dust, and sparkling particles bursting around the package, especially behind it and across the floor. At the bottom right, place a small round brand logo above the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="No Lay's, No Game."}. content: Create a clean, square split-screen commercial image for athleisure clothing with polished ad photography and realistic typography. At the top across the full width, place a large bold all-caps white headline in a heavy sans-serif font: {argument name="headline text" default="BOUGHT FOR THE GYM. USED FOR THE COUCH."} The layout is divided vertically into 2 equal panels. In the left panel, show a neatly arranged flat lay of 5 apparel items on a smooth light gray studio background with soft directional lighting and subtle shadows: 1 black hoodie with drawstrings and a small white swoosh-style chest logo, 1 pair of black athletic shorts with a small white logo near the hem, 1 pair of white crew socks with black swoosh-style logos, and 1 pair of black running shoes with white midsoles and white swoosh-style side logos. The clothing should look premium, minimal, and carefully styled like an e-commerce campaign. In the right panel, show a young man wearing the same black hoodie, black shorts, white crew socks, and black running shoes, slouched lazily on a dark charcoal fabric couch in a dim cozy living room, holding a smartphone and looking relaxed and unmotivated. In front of him on a dark coffee table are 6 visible lounge items: 1 open pizza box with a pizza, 1 red soda can, 1 large red bag of nacho cheese tortilla chips, 1 TV remote, 1 blue bowl of chips, and 1 pink-frosted sprinkled donut partly visible at the bottom edge. Add a draped gray blanket on the couch and keep the mood humorous and relatable. At the bottom center, overlay a smaller white caption in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline text" default="Still worth it."} High-end product advertising aesthetic, crisp text rendering, brand-aware lifestyle marketing, realistic materials, balanced composition, subtle contrast between aspirational fitness purchase and actual couch use.

content: Create a clean Japanese lifestyle advertisement poster for a futuristic compact home appliance that automatically folds laundry. Use a bright, airy, minimalist Scandinavian-style living room in the background with soft daylight, white walls, a light wood table, a sofa, and green plants near a window, all softly blurred to keep focus on the product. The main product is a sleek white rectangular machine with rounded corners on a tabletop, shown in a 3/4 front view, with its front door tray folded down and a neatly folded white T-shirt sliding outward from the machine. Add a faint digital display on the top front panel showing “04” and subtle modern control icons. content: Luxury fashion advertisement, vertical editorial product ad shot at golden hour on a high-rise balcony overlooking a modern city skyline at sunset. A stylish woman stands in a confident three-quarter pose, framed from mid-thigh up, with her face obscured by a simple rectangular block matching warm brown-orange tones. She has long, softly wavy brunette hair lit by warm backlight from the setting sun. She wears a black tailored blazer over a fitted white scoop-neck ribbed top and high-waisted light beige trousers, with one hand in her pocket and the other holding a structured taupe leather handbag with a top handle, flap closure, polished gold clasp hardware, and a hanging leather tag. The bag is the visual hero and should look premium, elegant, and sharply detailed. Use cinematic warm lighting, soft rim light on the hair, subtle luxury color grading, shallow depth of field, and blurred skyscrapers in the background. Compose the layout like a premium brand campaign with large text and icons on the left side. At top left, place a refined serif monogram logo: {argument name="brand monogram" default="L"}. Below it, large white serif headline text stacked in uppercase: {argument name="headline text" default="CARRY CONFIDENCE. EVERYDAY."}. Beneath that, add a short white serif body copy in 4 lines: {argument name="body text" default="Timeless design. Effortless elegance. Made for every moment that moves you forward."}. Add exactly 3 circular line icons with labels arranged vertically: premium leather, timeless design, made to last. At the bottom left, place the brand name in large elegant serif capitals: {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"}, with smaller uppercase tagline below: {argument name="tagline" default="BAGS THAT DEFINE YOU."}. Add a bordered call-to-action button reading “SHOP THE COLLECTION” with a small right arrow. Overall style: upscale, aspirational, polished e-commerce campaign, photorealistic fashion ad, luxurious but modern, clean typography, balanced negative space, magazine-quality composition.

content: Create a clean luxury skincare product advertisement in a square 1:1 layout with a warm beige studio background and strong natural sunlight casting soft palm-leaf shadows across the wall. Place 1 amber glass dropper bottle on the left-center, standing upright on a round cream stone pedestal. The bottle has a glossy gold collar and a matte white rubber dropper top. Add a white rectangular label with elegant minimal typography: brand name "{argument name="brand name" default="NATURELLE SKINCARE"}" at the top, a large orange product name "{argument name="product name" default="VITAMIN C"}", then black text reading "BRIGHTENING SERUM" and smaller subtext "With Hyaluronic Acid & Niacinamide". Surround the pedestal with 3 visible glossy green tropical leaves, arranged from the left edge and behind the bottle for a fresh botanical look. On the right side, place a large bold black serif headline in 3 stacked lines reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Glow Naturally. Every Day."}". Beneath it, add a smaller clean sans-serif benefits line reading "{argument name="benefits text" default="Brightens | Hydrates | Protects"}". Below that, include 3 circular black outline ingredient or values icons in a horizontal row, each with a simple leaf-style symbol inside; add tiny caption text beneath them with the same slightly imperfect ad-like wording seen in the original, including "Barban Free", "Dermicologyg", and "Creuty-free". At the lower right, place a glossy rounded green call-to-action button with white bold text "{argument name="button text" default="Shop Now"}". Add 1 sliced orange on the far right edge, partially cropped, with vivid juicy texture to reinforce the vitamin C theme. Include a small white "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Style the whole image as a polished commercial product mockup, photorealistic, high-end beauty branding, soft warm highlights, subtle shadows, balanced composition, sharp label detail, premium ecommerce social ad aesthetic.

content: A premium e-commerce poster for fresh blueberries in a clean Chinese product-advertising style. Show a clear plastic clamshell box of blueberries as the main subject, placed diagonally from lower center to right side on folded blue fabric, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The package must remain realistic and consistent: a transparent square container with rounded corners, filled with dark blue blueberries, with a large irregular rounded label on top in white, pale blue, and deep blue, featuring one oversized blueberry illustration in the center and elegant Chinese branding. Make the fruit inside look larger, plumper, fresher, and covered with subtle moisture droplets, while keeping the overall blueberry arrangement believable. The background is an airy icy-blue tabletop with soft cloudy texture, cool daylight, and scattered loose blueberries around the package. Add a few blurred green leaves entering from the top right and bottom right edges for a fresh natural feeling. In the upper-right corner, include 1 small inset image showing the original product package from above on a warm brown surface, like a reference thumbnail. On the left side, create Chinese promotional typography with a large dark blue calligraphy headline {argument name="headline text" default="决茗新"}, followed by 2 smaller lines of copy: {argument name="subheadline text" default="新鲜蓝莓 自然之选"} and {argument name="tagline text" default="每一颗都是自然的礼物"}. Below that, place 3 vertically stacked feature icons with short Chinese captions: a leaf icon for natural ripeness, a fruit icon for juicy fullness, and a heart icon for rich nutrition. Near the bottom left, add large white brush-style Chinese text {argument name="product name" default="蓝莓"}, a secondary line {argument name="benefit text" default="膳食纤维+花青素"}, and a small net weight line reading 125克. Use cool blue color grading, crisp commercial lighting, sparkling highlights on the plastic lid, premium supermarket packaging aesthetics, high detail, realistic product photography blended with polished graphic design.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base style and preserving the central chicken illustration, transform the image into a product packaging label for a herbal soup mix. Shift the chicken to the right side. Replace the top text with a large, bold black brush-stroke headline {argument name="main headline" default="元气祛湿 鸡煲汤包"} and a smaller subtitle {argument name="subtitle" default="吃山林土货 味道当然好!"}. On the left side, add a new woven basket containing exactly 6 distinct piles of ingredients: woody root sticks, white square cubes, round sliced brown roots, yellow soybeans, dried orange peel strips, and dark red dates. Attach 6 small brown rectangular labels with white text to these ingredients. Below the chicken, add a circular orange badge containing the text {argument name="ingredients list" default="内含有:五指毛桃、茯苓、土茯苓、黄豆、陈皮、红枣"}. At the bottom, create a solid orange rectangular banner featuring a cooking pot icon, the text {argument name="usage instructions" default="用法:把汤料清洗干净放入锅中，加入姜片煮20分钟，后加入鸡肉再煮20分钟即可。"}, and a secondary slogan {argument name="bottom slogan" default="天然好料 滋补好汤"}.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the materials source, show the finished handmade baby sensory toy made from those supplies instead of the unopened products. Create a realistic smartphone photo on the same light wood floor: one clear empty plastic bottle standing upright, with its cap secured and wrapped in exactly two colored tape sections from the reference materials — a yellow top and a dark green band below it. Put the craft materials inside the bottle: exactly four clearly visible colorful pom-poms in pink, red, blue, and purple, plus crumpled translucent yellow-orange color film pieces. Remove the packaging, labels, and foam mat edge from the scene so the focus is only on the completed toy. Keep natural indoor lighting, casual home-photo perspective, mild blur, and realistic reflections on the plastic bottle. Optional customization: make the toy a {argument name="toy type" default="baby sensory bottle"} using {argument name="cap tape colors" default="yellow and dark green"} and {argument name="inside materials" default="colorful pom-poms and crumpled translucent yellow-orange film"}.

content:
Goal: Create a cyberpunk e-commerce desktop first-view landing page for {argument name="brand name" default="NEXA"}, promoting a limited-time {argument name="campaign name" default="CYBER FLASH CAMPAIGN"} in a neon futuristic style.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 website hero screen, dark black/navy background, full-bleed cyber grid floor receding in perspective, glowing magenta and cyan circuitry framing the edges. High contrast, glossy reflections, electric neon bloom, futuristic HUD aesthetic.

Layout: Top navigation bar with the brand logo on the left and exactly 5 navigation items on the right: “SALE”, “FEATURE”, “ITEMS”, “FAQ”, and a bordered neon button “CHECK NOW”. The hero section is split into two columns: left text-and-CTA area, right large promotional banner graphic.

Left hero content: Add a small rounded pill label reading {argument name="campaign name" default="CYBER FLASH CAMPAIGN"}. Main headline in Japanese and English: “今だけの” above huge bold “FLASH SALE”, white letters with hot-pink glow. Below it, two short Japanese description lines: “対象アイテムが期間限定でスペシャルプライス。” and “7/15(火) 13:59までの限定オファーをお見逃しなく。” Add a neon outlined limited-time bar with a clock icon and text “LIMITED TIME : 7/15(火) 13:59まで”. Beneath are exactly 2 CTA buttons: a hot-pink filled glowing button “今すぐチェック ›” and a cyan outlined button “対象商品を見る ›”. At the bottom of the left column, show exactly 3 small benefit chips with icons: truck icon “送料無料”, user icon “会員限定特典”, gift icon “数量限定”.

Right promotional graphic: A large square/near-square neon poster card with a glowing magenta border and cyan HUD corner details, set slightly right of center. Inside the card, show a futuristic city street at night with skyscrapers, magenta/cyan lights, and a perspective grid road. Center a large neon alarm clock outline containing bold stacked text “FLASH SALE” and cyan text “LIMITED OFFER”. Below it, add Japanese “期間限定”, then the deadline {argument name="deadline text" default="7/15(火) 13:59まで"}, then a bright magenta rounded button “CHECK NOW”. Include small decorative HUD charts, circular targets, circuit marks, and arrows around the poster, but keep all text legible.

Visual style: Use black, deep navy, hot magenta, electric cyan, and white. Typography should be bold condensed sans-serif for English sale text, clean modern Japanese sans-serif for Japanese copy. Add strong neon glows, thin circuit-line borders, chromatic highlights, and polished reflections on the grid floor.

Constraints: Desktop website first-view only, no browser chrome, no people, no extra product images, no watermark. Keep the exact visible counts: 5 navigation items, 2 CTA buttons, 3 benefit chips, and 1 large right-side sale poster. Make the composition feel like a finished PC landing page hero based on a banner design.

content: Create a photorealistic cutout stock image of a single mature {argument name="tree type" default="broadleaf deciduous tree"}, isolated and centered, showing the entire tree from roots to crown. The tree has a thick textured brown trunk that splits into several large upward branches, dense irregular rounded foliage, many small glossy leaves in varied {argument name="leaf color" default="bright spring green"} tones, natural shadows within the canopy, and fine visible branch details peeking through the leaves. Use even studio-style daylight, sharp focus, high detail, no ground, no landscape, no people, no text. Place it on a {argument name="background style" default="transparent-background preview checkerboard"} made of subtle light gray and white squares, as if displaying a PNG asset with transparency. Composition: square canvas, tree centered vertically and horizontally, crown nearly fills the upper width, trunk centered in the lower third, clean object-cutout edges, realistic botanical proportions.

content: Please take this photo of the {argument name="location" default="bathroom"} and naturally organize the lived-in clutter into a {argument name="atmosphere" default="clean, well-ordered, hotel-like"} bathroom without changing the layout or structural elements like the tub, shower, mirror, lighting, walls, or flooring. Specifically, remove or organize the numerous bottles, refill bags, small items, cleaning supplies, nets, and extra storage baskets found on the tub lid, counter, floor, and shelves into just a few uniform bottles. Clear the floor and areas around the tub to make the space look larger. Naturally remove mirror fog, water spots, and stains from the walls and counter for a bright, clean finish. Maintain a warm, natural lighting atmosphere while making the overall photo slightly brighter and correcting distortions or dark areas. However, keep the bathroom shape, door position, tub, shower fixtures, mirror, lighting, wall panels, and floor textures faithful to the original image. Do not add new furniture or unnatural decorations. Aim for a natural, realistic finish similar to actual real estate or professional cleaning before-and-after photos.

Specifically, remove or organize the numerous bottles, refill bags, small items, cleaning supplies, nets, and extra storage baskets found on the tub lid, counter, floor, and shelves into just a few uniform bottles. content:
Ultra-realistic 16:9 close-up scan of a {argument name="country" default="Canadian"} citizenship card placed on a clean light grey/white background. The card is horizontally aligned, centered in frame, captured in sharp focus with studio lighting.

Design features a modern government-issued ID layout with bilingual English and French text. Top-left includes the {argument name="flag" default="Canadian flag"} with a red maple leaf. Header text reads “{argument name="header" default="CANADA – CANADIAN CITIZENSHIP CARD / CARTE DE CITOYENNETÉ CANADIENNE"}.”

The card includes a passport-style portrait of a young woman: medium-length dark brown hair, center-parted, natural makeup, warm skin tone, neutral expression, direct gaze, subtle freckles, wearing minimal jewelry and a dark top.

Personal details section includes:
– Surname: MARTIN
– Given names: ÉMILIE SOPHIE
– Citizenship number: 1234-5678
– Date of birth: 14 APR 1996
– Place of birth: MONTRÉAL, QC, CANADA
– Issue date: 20 MAY 2024
– Expiry date: 20 MAY 2034

Background design includes intricate guilloche patterns, microprinting, and soft pastel gradients. A large holographic maple leaf occupies the right side with iridescent rainbow reflections.

Additional elements:
– Government of Canada emblem in top-right
– Embedded hologram square with maple leaf security seal
– Fine-line engraving patterns across the surface
– Signature at bottom right (“Émilie S. Martin”)

Lighting is soft and even, highlighting laminated plastic texture, subtle reflections, and security overlays. No hand visible. Clean, minimal, professional composition. Photorealistic, high detail, 8K quality.

content: Create a clean modern e-commerce product detail page for a premium mechanical keyboard brand called {argument name="brand name" default="KeyForge"}, presented as a high-fidelity desktop website mockup on a white background with subtle light-gray dividers and generous spacing. The layout is a single unified storefront scene with a top navigation bar, a left product thumbnail rail, a large center product hero image, and a right-side purchase information panel. In the header, place the bold wordmark on the far left, then 7 navigation items reading “Keyboards”, “Switches”, “Keycaps”, “Accessories”, “Sale”, “Blog”, and “Support”, and on the far right 3 icons for search, account, and cart, with a small black notification badge showing “1” on the cart. The main product shown in the center is a compact 75% mechanical keyboard photographed from a slightly elevated front angle on a pale gray stage, with an aluminum case in silver, white and gray keycaps, several accent keys in lavender purple, and a silver volume knob at the top right. The left vertical gallery contains exactly 5 thumbnails: 1 selected front product shot, 1 angled keyboard view, 1 mechanical switch close-up, 1 keycap texture close-up, and 1 dark video thumbnail with a circular play icon. The right product panel includes a small pill badge reading “NEW”, a large bold product name {argument name="product name" default="KeyForge K75 Pro"}, a subtitle “75% Mechanical Keyboard”, a 5-star rating row with 4.8 and “(126 reviews)”, a large bold price {argument name="price" default="$129.99"} followed by a green “In Stock” status, and a short two-sentence description about premium performance, gasket-mounted design, QMK/VIA support, and RGB. Under that, include a “Switch Type” selector with exactly 4 pill buttons labeled “Cherry MX Red”, “Gateron Brown”, “Gateron Blue”, and “TTC Gold Pink”, with the first selected; a “Color” selector with exactly 3 pill buttons labeled “White / Purple”, “Black / Gray”, and “Navy / Blue”, with the first selected; a “Quantity” dropdown set to “1”; one large black primary button labeled “Add to Cart” with a cart icon; and one outlined secondary button labeled “Add to Wishlist” with a heart icon. Beneath the buttons, show exactly 3 horizontal service highlights with small icons: “Free Shipping” with subtext “On orders over $99”, “30-Day Returns” with subtext “Hassle-free returns”, and “2-Year Warranty” with subtext “Peace of mind”. In the lower content area, create a two-column section separated by light lines. On the left is a vertical tab list with exactly 5 items: “Overview” selected, then “Specifications”, “What’s in the Box”, “Shipping & Returns”, and “Reviews (126)”. To the right of the tabs, place a rounded white feature card grid with exactly 6 feature blocks in 2 rows of 3, each with a simple line icon, bold title, and short explanatory text: “75% Layout”, “Gasket-Mounted”, “QMK/VIA Support”, “Hot-Swappable”, “RGB Backlighting”, and “Premium Build”. On the far right of this lower area, add a specifications bullet list with exactly 7 bullets: “Layout: 75% (82 Keys)”, “Switch Type: Cherry MX Red”, “Mounting: Gasket-Mounted”, “Connectivity: USB-C (Wired)”, “Backlight: RGB, South-facing”, “Material: Aluminum Case”, and “Dimensions: 322 x 135 x 42 mm”, plus an additional final bullet “Weight: 1.25 kg”. Use a refined minimalist product-design aesthetic, realistic UI spacing, clean sans-serif typography similar to Inter or SF Pro, soft shadows, subtle rounded corners, monochrome icons, and polished startup-style consumer electronics presentation.
